荒野的邀约.say: 港区·指挥室
又到度假出行的时间了，这一次去哪里玩比较好呢？
感觉这是个难题呢，毕竟选择范围好像越来越小了。
没关系，拉菲只要有地方睡觉就好……zZZZZ……
有没有那种更特别的地方啊？我想玩点不一样的嘛，更刺激一点的！
刺激的~？去潜水如何？朝着海洋深处，探寻不可思议——
嗯？我刚刚听到有人在说不可思议？在哪在哪儿？！
开个玩笑而已啦……真的去深海里应该也很危险吧？
要好好选一个既有趣，又能保证指挥官安全的度假地点呢~
少女们聚在一起，认真地讨论着度假地点。
嗯……指挥官，我感觉像这样讨论很难有个明确的结果。
的确。不过也确实如你刚才所说……选择范围不多。
呵呵~我好像听到有人在因为选择度假地而烦恼呢？
匹兹堡说着从门外走了进来，她的食指和中指夹着一封邀请函，在我面前晃了晃。
打开看看吧~指挥官。能够有效解决大家当下的困扰哦？
从她手中接过邀请函打开后，信笺中端正又不失潇洒的熟悉字迹映入眼帘。
“相信诸位在这个时刻，一定会因为选择度假地而烦恼。”
“所以我们诚挚的邀请各位前往帕里塞克度假小镇，体验不同的度假之旅。印第安纳、企业敬上……”
咦？帕里塞克度假小镇？那是什么？
听起来就像是有软软的床的地方……
……帕里塞克（Parisek）这个名字总感觉有点熟悉……
你在哪里听说过这个名字么？
这个名字可是大家完完全全重新起的，应该不会重名吧！
帕里塞克（Parisek）……帕里塞得（Palisade）……？
啊……没什么，请别在意。
那说回到度假小镇上吧~？
我知道了~既然是白鹰特色风情，一定是那种张开嘴就会有机器人喂你可乐、吃汉堡和爆米花的地方吧！
……之前大家不是一起去过重樱的离岛泡温泉么？虽然途中发生了一些小插曲。
从那次之后，企业她们就一直想找个机会，也让大家体验一下属于白鹰的特色风情。
所以私下一直在筹备着这个度假小镇……现在终于可以对大家公开了~
哦~！所以一定是那种张开嘴就会有机器人喂你喝可乐，吃汉堡和爆米花的地方吧~！
不用强调两遍啊……！
虽然我也无法否认这种刻板印象确实存在……但总之肯定不是这样的吧！
白鹰的特色风情……难道是牛仔？
呵呵，没错。不愧是指挥官~立刻就找到了正确答案。
和提到重樱就会想起温泉一样，提到白鹰就会想起牛仔才对吧~？
牛仔么……也就是说，我们可以去一睹西部风情了？！
嗯哼哼~我一定要拍很多很多照片留念~！
这次也是多亏了法戈，用无人机帮忙运送了不少物资，不然可能就赶不上了！哈哈！
为客户提供足够优质的服务是我司的使命和愿景。
面无表情的少女在得到夸奖后，适时地将一张名片递到了我的手中。
虽然目前在创业中，且老板与员工都由我一人担任……总之，请指挥官今后多与我合作。
喵？创业中的速递公司？喵呼呼……有没有兴趣和明石签长期合作协议喵？
啊，又被明石抢先了一步……我也有问题想问啦~能运新鲜蔬菜水果么~
名为法戈的少女被立刻“包围”。
不去干预几人的未来“商业会谈”，将视线重新投注到匹兹堡和内华达身上。
我们怎么去度假小镇？
这个不用担心，企业安排了客运飞机，明天就会来接大家。
大家今天收拾好行李就行！
好耶！西部的荒野，呼啸的狂风，一定还有什么神秘的金矿和诅咒之类的不可思议——！
呵呵，顺带一提，本次旅途中的导游就是我。
匹兹堡一边说着，一边又向我的身边凑近。
一定会让指挥官有一趟难·忘的旅程呢~
在决定应企业和印第安纳的邀约，前往她们精心准备的帕里塞克度假小镇之后。
大家欢呼着纷纷回去收拾行李，等待着接下来的度假之旅。
第二天一早，跟随着匹兹堡的指引登上客运飞机。
又过了一段时间后——
好困啊……我昨晚激动地没睡好觉……
应该快到了的说，绫波已经看到风景不一样了的说。
真的耶！西部小镇……酒馆……牛仔服！我们来啦！
说话间，飞机缓缓降落。
但是从舱门出来后，映入眼帘的却是一望无际的荒地和沙漠。
小镇……呢？说好的度假……呢？
哎呀，昨天喝了太多果汁，导致忘了和大家说了……
虽然是邀请大家去度假，但是要体验完整的西部风情，第一步要从拓荒开始。
拓、拓荒……？
也、也就是说，我们其实是被骗来做苦力？！
没…没关系……重剑没问题……会连带着把指挥官的那一份也做好……
噗哈哈哈……一看就是开玩笑的啦~你们也太好骗了吧。
呵呵，确实是开玩笑的。这里只是特意做过硬化处理的临时停机坪。
接下来要去坐火车前往度假小镇，大家请跟我来吧。
跟着匹兹堡，登上了通往帕里塞克度假小镇的专列。
真正的度假之旅，现在才要刚刚开始哦——

列车上的枪声.say: 列车之上——
检测到当前环境下，大家开心的情绪数值与平常相比提升了67.11%。
这就是“度假”这一行为带来的提升么……
嗯……为了融入环境，我应该也调整“开心”的情绪数值占比。
“激动”的情绪占比也需要适度上调23.64%。
不、不不应该是这样……法戈的方法不对……
阿尔萨斯有度假的经验，让阿尔萨斯来教法戈……！
判定：调整情绪数值只停留在表面，无法理解本质逻辑。
法戈和加斯科涅一样，仍然需要学习。
如果想要更有效率地解决这个问题……我觉得我可以帮你们想想办法。
纳希莫夫会直接用程序覆盖，这样不是最好的解决方法……
法戈应该和阿尔萨斯学习如何利用情感模块……虽、虽然有点容易失控……
列车窗外是属于西部的荒野风景，耳畔回荡的是少女们的谈话声。
然而在一片欢闹之中，还有别样的声音浮现。
啊啊啊，一想到度假的时候工作也不会减少反而还会变多就焦虑到不行了……
呜……可是带着工作出门的话姐姐我又没办法好好享受和指挥官的时光……
虽然完全能理解……但是享受当下也很重要嘛！
不要让工作影响了假期的心情哦~迪普莱克斯女士！
嗯……你说的对。
之后回去无论是加班还是通宵怎样都好，姐姐我现在要享受假期！
这样才对嘛！
再过一会儿我们就会抵达度假小镇了哦~
匹兹堡穿行在列车的走廊中间，向大家宣布着即将抵达终点的消息。
欸？这么快就要到了么？
毕竟是只通向度假小镇的短途列车嘛。
而且，之所以要专门乘坐火车，也是为了让大家更好地提前感受西部风情。
原来如此，这就是列车的外观和内饰都特意复古的原因么。
甚至还保留了汽笛的设计……
嗯~既然是西部度假之旅，那当然全程都要符合这个主题才对。
不过指挥官刚刚一直不参与大家的话题，是把注意力放在这些事上了么~？
不如把这份注意力放在更有趣一些的地方……怎么样？
匹兹堡坐在了我身侧的空位上。说话间，散发着甜蜜的水果香气。
嗯……？果汁的味道？
怎么办呢，被指挥官发现了~可别向印第安纳和企业她们举报我哦~？
就在我想说些什么的时候，列车的汽笛声响了起来。
再度向窗外看去，黑色的铁轨横穿过荒野，前方便是小镇影绰的痕迹。
看起来马上就要到了？
没错，不过……
砰砰——！
你今天是逃不掉的！到底谁的帮派才是这个小镇的主宰……该有个结果了！
我可不想跟你争这个胜负~不如一起合作把这些肥羊宰了怎么样？
车窗外，两道马背上的身影疾驰着。
有道理……
那边的指挥官，识相的话就快把钱交出来吧，不然的话……
（虽然不知道她们到底在演什么，但总之先配合总没错。）
不、不然的话会怎么样……？
不然就会收到来自鲱鱼的大礼哦~啾~
伴随着少女的飞吻，列车突然产生了一阵剧烈的晃动。
炸药……？
哈哈哈哈，喜欢么~？
把值钱的东西留在车上！所有人原地下车！
在按照U-556的要求，将行李都留在列车上后，由鲱鱼将我们这些“肥羊”押送到小镇上。
穿越刚刚爆炸和枪战扬起的烟尘后，小镇终于在我们眼前露出了全貌。
——当然，还有在小镇入口，露出爽朗笑容迎接我们的印第安纳等人。
好了~我的演出任务结束了，欢迎大家来到帕里塞克度假小镇~！
哈哈哈哈哈哈！指挥官，你们总算是到了。
刚刚那一出戏码你们感觉怎么样？有没有一种真正到了西部的感觉？
还是不够刺激，和我想象中的狂野西部有一定差距。
这种欢迎形式还挺特别的，比我想象中要有趣得多。
企业前辈，我就说指挥官肯定能接受的嘛！
嗯？这个点子是你想的么，埃塞克斯。
嘿嘿，没错哦。毕竟难得把大家邀请到这里嘛，想别开生面一点。
嗯，我们提前排练了几次，调整过几次演出的方向。
最后选了现在这个相对来说比较温和的版本。
不过美中不足的是想出这个点子的时候大家手头的工作都很忙。
所以枪战啦、抢火车啦，人手都不够，效果大打折扣了。
是啊，不然数十个蒙面牛仔在火车外激战什么的，一定更有看头。
Good idea！
欸？
我是说，数十个蒙面牛仔在火车外激战是个好主意啦！
指挥官，你难道不觉得这里很适合拍电影么！
你是受了她们的欢迎仪式的启发么？
没错没错~！指挥官，你看这里！
一望无际的荒野，寻找救赎的主人公，在萧瑟的夕阳下走入某个边陲小镇……
然后在这个小镇之中卷入某场混乱什么的~是不是很狂野、很有趣？
就算这里很适合拍电影……也没有设备吧？而且也没有剧本。
嗯？设备我都带了哦！应有尽有，一应俱全！这就是美少女艺人关岛的余裕~
不……一般度假也不会带这些吧……
越是度假才反而越是要带这些哦，不然错过什么精彩瞬间就太可惜了。
说回拍电影啦——剧本的话，我觉得交给海天小姐应该没问题？
那、那个，小女子其实不是很擅长这个题材……
如果要把剧本交给我的话，可能还需要白鹰的同伴做顾问。
放心放心~这个好解决~
好了，这下问题就解决啦！之后就在度假的间隙拍电影吧！
等等，在这之前，我要确认一下这两天的日程。
如果和企业她们安排好的日程冲突了的话……
这一点指挥官不用担心，我们只安排了两次体验活动。
其它时间大家就在小镇上自由活动就好，所以就算要拍电影，也不会影响。
至于体验活动的内容是什么……就留待明天举办的时候再揭晓吧！
好了，大家放在车上的行李U-556已经帮忙送到酒店里了。
接下来大家就在这个小镇里随便逛逛、玩一玩吧！

拓荒者的第一课.say: 清晨，在接到了来自约克城的消息后，来到了位于小镇外的集合点。
诸位，今天的活动是“拓荒体验”哦。
真是一个听起来就很累的活动……
不可以逃避，在这种时候付出劳动，也是作为骑士该做的。
虽然能从活动名称上猜到大致要做什么，但是实际要做的内容是……？
拓荒，顾名思义就是开拓荒地，将这里变成适宜居住的环境。
没错~从小村落、再到小镇，甚至还有可能发展成为城市……
大概就是这样的感觉啦~
拓荒者们就是一边寻找着食物和水源，一边在荒野上开拓出属于自己的天地呢。
运气、实力、还有发展的眼光，都缺一不可哦。
也就是说，我们要在这里从零开始，规划一座全新的城镇蓝图？
我喜欢这个！
很好！就在这里建立一座能够让所有人都能瞻仰撒丁荣光的城镇吧！
呃……其实这次只是体验活动啦，所以大家只要搭建自己的小木屋就好哦~
我们提前准备好了足够的木材，但是也需要大家二次处理。
不过大家请放心，相关的工具我们都准备好了哦~
嗯~？这“拓荒体验”，应该不只是这么简单吧？
当然啦，规划和搭建的时间有限，寻找食物和水源的时间也有限。
也就是说在规定的时间内成功搭建小木屋……
并且解决食物和饮水问题的人，才是合格的“拓荒者”呢。
这难度是不是突然变得有点太高了？
如果指挥官觉得太难的话，寻找食物的部分可以去掉哦~
由我们直接提供罐头也没问题的。
罐头……莫非是传说中的鲱鱼罐头么？
传说……安克雷奇……不知道是什么……但是想吃……！
嗯哼。如果大家想要降低难度的话，可以直接选择罐头呢。
毕竟在拓荒的时候，可没有更多的选择余地~
呵呵……确实是呢。不妨将罐头作为保底措施吧？
未能在时限内成功搭建的话，也会影响到寻找食物和水源的时间。
那么为了不饿肚子，就得吃下鲱鱼罐头。指挥官意下如何？
这完全变成了惩罚措施吧？
只是用于激发大家的干劲而已——你看，那边已经有人开始画图了哦？
顺着克莱蒙梭手指的方向望去。
迪普莱克斯和斯特拉斯堡已经各自拿着空白的图纸开始了自己的设计规划。
鲱鱼罐头什么的……绝对不要……！
姐姐我也绝对不要吃鲱鱼罐头这种比通宵加班还要恐怖的东西！
其他人在看到了两人的举动后，也纷纷抓紧时间开始了自己的设计规划。
呵呵~果然这样的活动才有趣啊。
虽然我很乐意亲手喂指挥官品尝鲱鱼罐头……
但指挥官自己也要加油哦？
少女轻笑了一声，随后拿起图纸开始了自己的规划。
（我也不能落下进度啊……）
一段时间后。
咦？拉菲，你怎么就画了个三角形？
拉菲觉得两边夹起来就够了……可以当做简单的卧室。
只要能钻进去睡觉就好……zZZZ……
嗯……是不是把忏悔室改成祷告室比较好呢~？
不过果然还是忏悔室更能让人乐在其中吧……呵呵~
啧，这片空地根本不够发挥本王的创意！
我也有深有同感。只能搭建一个小房间……要如何才能……！
没想到大家在设计阶段就有这么高涨的热情呢~
新泽西四处张望着，然后走到了我的身旁。
Honey做了什么样的规划？能给我看看吗？
将手中的图纸交给了新泽西。
嗯？这个布局是……指挥室？
Honey，你是不是还没办法把自己从工作状态里剥离出来，好好享受假期……？
少女的眼神里出现了明显的担忧神色。
不是。只是在规划房屋的时候，想到了一件事。
大家不是都会来指挥室么？所以某种程度上，它对我来说就是一切的开始。
在规划的时候，情不自禁就这么设计了。
呵呵，真是犯规的发言啊，指挥官同志。
既然仆从都这么说了……真是的。皇家女仆队，都来帮忙搭建这个西部指挥室啦！
遵命，陛下。
在同伴们的倾力协助下，一间木制的“西部指挥室”搭建完成。
虽然结果令人欣慰……不过我们好像都错过了寻找食物和水源的时间呢。
那就按照约定，向大家提供鲱鱼罐头咯~
等、等一下……这种时候，再让我试一试……！
抚顺一边说着，一边将地上散落的木材堆到一起。
搭出了一个简易的小高台后，她走了上去。
设坛台足踏魁罡，抚顺我持法剑把七星坛上……！
咳咳……虽然没有剑啦。
抚顺，你这是在做什么……？
当然是借助一些神秘力量……！既然东风能借，那没道理食物不能借嘛！
风来——雨来——食物来——！
哎呦……！
既没有狂风，也没有暴雨，更没有食物。
回应抚顺的只有一团团砸向她的风滚草。
还是老老实实回来吃罐头吧~
随后，鲱鱼将罐头发到了大家的手中。
大家在“西部指挥室”中席地而坐，准备体验这“简便”的一餐。
屏住呼吸将罐头打开后，罐头中盛着的并非鱼肉，而是熟悉的军粮。
嗯？是故意将普通的罐头换成了鲱鱼罐头的包装么？
嘻嘻嘻，当然啦。因为不是每个人都能够理解鲱鱼罐头的美味之处嘛。
所以我准备了这些。不过大家脸上的表情，实在是很精彩哦~
哇、哇呀呀——！怎么我手里的是真鲱鱼罐头……救命啊！
啊，我忘了里面还混着真的了……
咳咳，虽然这个展开和一开始的活动设想相差甚远……
但这也是种难忘的体验呢。对吧，指挥官？
冲约克城点点头后，看向在指挥室中奔跑的抚顺和追在她身后的鲱鱼。
的确……很难忘。
于是，“拓荒体验”在弥散的鲱鱼罐头味中落下帷幕——

淘金热潮.say: 翌日清晨，根据手机上大黄蜂发来的消息前往了集合地点。
嘿嘿，指挥官今天居然是准时来而不是提早来？
啊~看来度假酒店的床一定很舒服，让你也赖床了呢。
好恐怖的发言，准时对指挥官来说居然是赖床么……
哈哈哈，这个话题就先到这里吧！
今天的活动是“淘金体验”哦！我们给大家准备了不同的淘金装备~
欸？可是淘金的装备不就是固定那几样嘛，我昨天还特意问过埃塞克斯了。
话是这么说啦，但是印第安纳觉得加入一些更有新意的玩法更好。
所以除了基础的河道淘金用装备之外，还准备了全新的“磁铁钓鱼”用装备哦！
钓鱼？！
虽说是钓鱼，但其实就是用尼龙绳拴住强力磁铁，丢进河道里探宝。
想体验的话请来贝尔这边领取尼龙绳和强力磁铁哦。
想体验传统一点的河道淘金，就从我这里领取铲子和淘金锅这些必需品啦~！
听起来磁铁钓鱼要比河道淘金有趣很多耶！
可……强力磁铁岂不是无论如何都能吸到金属制品？用于淘金的话……
这不就是“永不空军”么？对寰昌来说应该是好事吧？
指挥官说的对……这样无论如何都能钓上东西来了……呜……
总之，大家各自选一下喜欢的方式和装备吧！
装备好之后我和贝尔会带大家前往附近的河道开始“淘金”哦！
（嗯……该选哪个好？）
没错，既然是西部，就一定要感受最原汁原味的淘金法！
完全无法抵抗“永不空军”的诱惑……试试这种不一样的淘金法吧！
在做了如此的决定后，拿上了装备，和贝尔等人一起前往了度假小镇附近的河道。
话说回来，只是带大家来体验淘金的话，会不会觉得有点无聊啊？
毕竟淘金也就是重复的机械劳动……要不要干脆比个赛啊？
但这样也只是双方比拼劳动所得的成果，趣味性并没有增加多少。
不妨对淘金的方式做一些调整？
比如在不违背河道淘金的前提下，利用手边的材料制作一些额外的工具来辅助。
你的意思是让大家各自发挥自己的创意来提高效率……从这个角度增加趣味性么？
没错，这样一来应该就不用担心枯燥无聊了。
倒是个好主意……大黄蜂，就这么实施吧。
了解~！
嗨嗨，紧张而又激烈的首届西部淘金比赛正在火热进行中！
我是本次淘金比赛的解说——青叶！
大家都在有条不紊地进行着淘金工作呢……那边的是——！
哦哦！原来是达芬奇选手为了加快淘金效率，利用手边已有的工具做了筛金系统啊……
嗯——？为什么筛上去的只有鹅卵石？
一定是哪里出了问题……没错……哦！我有新的灵感了——！
达芬奇选手的筛金系统似乎出现了一些小问题……
让我们来看看现场的其他选手吧！
阿尔弗雷多小姐！更多的现场情况就拜托你了！
没问题~包在我身上吧！
让我们把视线暂时放到磁铁钓鱼组——！
多么厉害的残影！巴尔的摩选手将绳子扔进了她早早就判断好的方位！
没错，那里一定有着金子！巴尔的摩选手脸上的表情是这么说的！
呃，其实我只是随便一扔……
哎呀，这就是解说的艺术加工嘛，巴尔的摩大姐也快点习惯一下~
好吧……
青叶和阿尔弗雷多在河道中跑来跑去，进行着所谓的“解说”。
（可惜关岛现在每天都把自己关在房间里进行剪辑，不然一定会更热闹吧。）
就在思考着这些，继续手上的淘金动作时——
不、不要啦……！我只是来看你们玩的啦，我不参加……！
可是鲱鱼看起来就很期待的样子……？
而且明明也拿了淘金设备，应该是很想和大家一起玩吧？
啰、啰嗦！我只是顺手拿的啦！
要是淘金之后出很多汗的话要怎么办……指挥官离得这么近……
嘻嘻嘻，原来鲱鱼也因为出汗而苦恼啊……那莫加多尔教你一个好方法……
什么方法？
只要把衣服脱掉，就不会那么热了……
请不要向他人灌输这种错误的方法。
还有，也请你不要试图在我的视线死角将你身上的斗篷脱掉。
可、可是一想到指挥官也跟人家在一起淘金……就是会觉得燥热难耐嘛……
那也不可以！
又一段时间后，大黄蜂和贝尔宣布时间用尽，开始检查双方的淘金成果。
虽然我知道从河道里捞出来什么东西都很正常啦……
但是为什么会从河道里捞出鱼雷……？
咳咳、这个我们也不知道是怎么一回事呢……
总之大家忙活了这么久，也是收获颇丰啊！
除了鱼雷之外，还有扳手、保险箱、鹅卵石……轮胎……？
咦……没有人淘到金子吗？
难道圣地亚哥前辈在准备的时候放错了……？
嗯？出什么问题了么？
没有哦！很完美！毕竟在西部淘金就是会有这样一无所获的情况嘛！
没、没错！贝尔也是这样认为的！
总之~今天的活动圆满结束……！

西部之夜.say: 在准备回酒店房间休息的时候——
哟，指挥官，你接下来有什么安排么？
正打算回去休息，不过如果有需要我帮忙的事也可以尽管提。
接下来我没什么特别的安排，是有什么需要我帮忙么？
也不是什么需要指挥官帮忙的要紧事。
只是今天月色格外好，我在想要不要举办一场临时的赏月会。
少女抬手指向了夜空。
小镇外的旷野之上，圆月低垂，仿若唾手可得。
嗯，确实是值得举办赏月会的景色。
哈哈哈，既然指挥官也这么认为，那我就通知大家了！
指挥官先跟我来吧，这里有一处最适合赏月的地点。
跟随着印第安纳，来到了开阔的空地上。
她将周围简单地清理干净，然后邀请我和她一起坐下。
银色的月光洒下，让平日里看起来爽朗的少女多了几分恬静和羞涩。
指挥官，我……
嗯？
哎！指挥官，印第安纳——！
我把大家都带过来了哦！还带了零食和饮料！
就在印第安纳准备说些什么的时候，埃塞克斯的声音突然响了起来。
……还是下次有机会再和你说吧。
反正……也不是什么特别重要的事情……咳……
少女的眼神游移不定，语气中也带着某种微妙的心虚。
指挥官、印第安纳，别说悄悄话啦！
一起来吃埃塞克斯准备的零食吧！嘿嘿~
之后和众人一起将空地附近又清理了一下。点燃了篝火后，围坐成一圈。
话说，今天不光是月亮很漂亮，就连星星也很多耶！
嗯……这格外灿烂的星象，没错……一定是暗黑镇魂曲诱骗我们放下警惕的手法！
暗黑镇魂曲？
吾友哟！看清楚了么！那边那颗最亮的星星，即是幽灵骑士的眼睛！
欸——连赏月的时候也要坚持这个背景设定吗？
当然！这可是我的人设……咳、这可是吾之魔眼看到的真相哟！
呵呵，这样的说法意外地很有趣啊。
企业前辈居然是吃这一套的人么？！
作为活跃气氛，或者活跃思维的说法，偶尔为之也没什么不好。
对吧，指挥官？
指、指挥官，怎么连你也……
好吧好吧，那银河呢？这个要怎么编啦。
嘿嘿，当做是牛仔们的太空牧场怎么样？
等一下大黄蜂，你编的这种不在她们刚刚的那一套设定体系里啦！
意思到了就行嘛！不要在意这种无所谓的细节~
呵呵，能像这样和大家一起有说有笑地在这里欣赏月色和星空……
其实也能算得上是一种浪漫吧~？
篝火噼啪作响，大家吃着零食，聊着这几天以来的度假感想。
总是聊这些稍微有点无趣呢~不如来聊聊这几天以来最难忘的事~？
啊，但是不可以说是一起拍电影呢~
为什么不能说拍电影？
都说拍电影的话，那答案不就又变得千篇一律起来了么。
有道理。那谁先来？要不就从最左边的U-556开始，挨个往后？
唔……难忘的事啊……
应该就是骑马了。为了在陆上也不减风采，我可是好好练习了一阵子！
怎么样？劫火车的时候果然很帅吧？哈哈！
不过马鞍真的好硬哦，希望下次能有更软一些的……
欸？要说的这么具体么……？
不用像U-556这么具体也可以，但是要说清楚情景~
真是麻烦……
就是今晚啦今晚！和指挥官一起，和大家一起……像这样享受着夜色。
没想到鲱鱼居然是这么纯情的类型啊~？
那你来说！
我么？对我来说难忘的当然是每·一·刻咯~
匹兹堡一边回应着鲱鱼，一边朝着我所在的位置蹭了过来。
你犯规！
我可没有犯规~情景不是很明确么？
大家七嘴八舌地讨论着彼此最难忘的时刻，直至夜色更浓。
就在准备结束这场临时赏月会之际——
诸位，让今夜结束的更有纪念意义一些，怎么样？
印第安纳掏出了腰间的左轮手枪，在手上甩了个漂亮的枪花后，对着夜空砰砰开了两枪。
哦！这个好耶！比烟花好玩！
像我们这些没准备手枪的呢……？
那就直接用舰炮吧！不过要小心别伤到指挥官，哈哈！
放心吧！
少女们展开舰装，更换演习弹，将炮口对准了浓稠的夜空。
不过也有些人直接装填了三式弹。
无数双带着期待的目光看向我，等待着一个指令。
枪炮声交织轰鸣，将夜色点亮。
纵有硝烟，却不是为了争斗，而是所有人于此，一同享受月色的特殊纪念。
指挥官，约好了。明年，再一起赏月……不，再和我们一起，不论去到哪里，都一起享受这种快乐吧！
少女们高喊着，嬉闹着，久久回荡在这西部的夜空之下。

属于我们的回忆.say: 如何如何~？大家快说说感想嘛！
在度假小镇中的电影院看完了关岛执导的电影后，她便迫不及待地询问起大家的感想。
没想到成片拍出来效果还不错啊！
确实呢。而且那个桥段，我记得拉菲是真的睡着了吧……？
嗯……拉菲还以为这段会被剪掉……没想到正片里还有……
哼哼~这就是美少女艺人关岛的剪辑实力哦~
不过话说回来，回去之后指挥官要不要考虑在港区设置个电影奖项啊？
不然每次拍了电影都没有评奖机制，会让人很丧失斗志耶——
嗯？关岛，是你肚子饿了么……？
糟、糟糕，一直把自己关在房间里做最后的冲刺剪辑……忘了吃饭了……
肚子饿得咕咕叫什么的，实在是太有损美少女的形象了……
哈哈哈哈，不过指挥官应该也不会介意的。
没错。既然关岛也饿了，大家就一起去准备午饭吧！

sequence: 「一段时间后——」

属于我们的回忆.say: 嗯……这样差不多了，该叫其他同伴们过来了。
不过今天的阳光有点刺眼，确定要在室外午餐么？
有什么不好的？这样也很有“西部”的感觉嘛！对吧，大黄蜂！
没错没错！既然是让大家来体验白鹰的西部风情，那最后一天也要让大家体验个够嘛！
嗯。我赞同印第安纳和大黄蜂的想法。
我猜，大家应该也不会介意这阳光，反而会很享受这个时刻。
呵呵，我腿上这孩子也很喜欢今天的天气呢。
黎塞留说着，将目光投向膝上的指挥喵。
就在她身后不远处，岛风正端着托盘急匆匆赶来。
哇啊啊、汉堡、汉堡……一不小心跑得太快了！
小心！
稳住身形，我来帮你。
喂——大家等下直接先吃吧——我先把马骑回马厩，不用等我——！
啊……请骑慢一点……我的帽子……
唔，阿蒂利奥也想试试看……骑马……
啊哈哈哈——抱歉抱歉——
马蹄阵阵，少女爽朗的声音渐渐飘远。
（真是难得的一幕啊。）
就在如此感叹着的时候，关岛像是想起了什么事一样，从我身旁穿过。
她同坐在我身边的法戈神神秘秘地商量了些什么后，冲我一笑。
嘘——指挥官看着就好了。
关岛用食指抵在唇边，示意让我不要声张。
随即，法戈的无人机便从角落中升空，开始了盘旋。
这是在航拍大家的午餐时光么？
没错~不过指挥官只说对了一半哦！
一半？
因为指挥官只说了行为，没猜到我的目的~所以是一半。
这种美好的瞬间当然要保存好记录啦~
只存在于脑海之中可是不够的~！
呵呵~关岛说的没错。
记忆会褪色变形，但留下影像资料的话，就可以时时刻刻重温了。
就是就是~看来本美少女的想法还是有人理解和支持的嘛~！
啊对了，指挥官，抬头笑一个吧？
……为什么？
当然是为了记录此时此刻，“指挥官也笑了”的美好的瞬间啦！
这……会不会有点太刻意了？
说的也是哦……看来还是多拍摄一些日常素材留用比较好。
嗯……那指挥官最好快点习惯被我拍摄~
毕竟像这样需要保留的美好瞬间，我相信今后只会多，不会少——

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 按照约定的时间来到了酒馆，推门而入后，看见匹兹堡已坐在桌子上等待着。
呵呵~你迟到了，赏金猎人。
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 匹兹堡轻轻摇晃着腿，对我露出了笑容。
（嗯……？这是第三幕的台词，看来匹兹堡已经入戏了。）
不算迟，毕竟我们等的人还没有来。
按照剧本上的编排，一边说着台词，一边走位到了匹兹堡身前。
这样么~？那……
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 在等待的时间里，不妨做些什么解解闷？
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: （……这是即兴发挥？）
匹兹堡轻轻地抓住了我的衣袖，身体朝我倾来。
温热的气息洒落在我的颈侧，周围的空气似乎也跟着升温。
怎么不说话了呢，赏金猎人？是不知道该做些什么吗~？
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 她手中的道具枪枪口抵住了我的胸口，轻轻地碾着我的外套往下滑。
（这已经超出即兴发挥的范畴了吧……？接下来的剧情不需要这种展开吧？）
嗯~那就让我来教你吧，解·闷·的·方·式♡~
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 她脸上带着淡色的红晕，双眼中是呼之欲出的情感。
（这个状态……她难道是……）
呵呵~你的心跳很快哦~？
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 是不是因为窗户开着，外面还有其他同伴经过……所以更有感觉了一些~？
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 匹兹堡……
嗯？我在听哦，你想对我做些什么呢~？我都可以满足你哦~
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 握住了匹兹堡手中的道具枪，阻止了她继续下滑的动作。
我们现在可是在排练！排练！快点进入状态啊，指挥官~
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 少女带着一些鼻音，发出不满地抱怨。
你已经醉了。
我没醉~真是的~
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 她用力向后一扯，想从我的手中抽出那把道具枪。
在拉扯之间，脚边的木桶翻倒在地，流出了少量的橙色液体。
这木桶里的是橙汁……？
呵呵~天气太热了，在拍摄的间隙忍不住就多喝了几口……
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 反正现在还是排练~指挥官要喝点橙汁解解渴么？
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 嗯……是不是已经被我喝完了？
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 她作势要去查看木桶，不过下一刻身体便摇晃着靠在了我的身上。
尝不到这样鲜甜的橙汁也是有点可惜呢。
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 或许我的嘴唇上还残留着橙子的甜味哦……要试试么~？
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 嗯~？赏金猎人……指挥官……你的身体怎么这么烫……？
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: （是她自己的体温变高了吧……？算了，这个状态下就算和她解释，她也听不进去。）
先找个地方休息吧，你这个状态也没法排练。
嗯？要去哪里休息呢？楼上就有房间哦，不过……
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 如果只是回去休息睡觉，那也太无聊了，我不去哦~
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 除非……
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

斟酒女郎的醉乡.say: 匹兹堡抬眼看向我，绯色的瞳孔中似乎也不尽是醉意。
除非，你陪我在房间里，一起做些有趣的事情吧♡~
斟酒女郎的醉乡.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆一隅的休憩时光.say: 呼——！总算把这一幕拍完了，没想到拍电影居然这么累！
印第安纳随性地坐在了木箱子上感慨。
毕竟拍摄了从天而降的戏份，那一幕消耗的体力很大。
嗯……也对，还重拍了几次。
看来我的健身计划还得加量啊……再怎么说也不能被拍摄电影累倒！
我记得下一场开拍时间在晚上，要不要先回去休息？
哦，我想等道具组的同伴过来，跟她们一起收拾地上那些碎木。
——就是从天而降那场戏里破坏的天花板。
毕竟是片场嘛，清理不及时的话，有同伴不小心被这些绊倒、受伤了，那就不好了。
不过我一个人也清理不完，所以请她们来帮忙。
我也留下来帮忙吧。
好啊！那就等她们来了，我们一起收拾吧！
说起来，你似乎总能注意到这些细枝末节，不论是战斗还是生活。
嗯？指挥官还蛮关注我的？
啊，原来是这样啊……我还以为……
我其实也一直关注着指……
……没什么！
……说回刚刚的话题吧！
刚刚是在说什么来着，细节是吧……？
这也算是从战斗中养成的习惯。只有不放过任何细微之处才能取胜！
嗯？你不是喜欢直接用拳头说话么？
这个嘛……拥有一拳就能击倒敌人的力量固然重要，但是也不能缺少智慧。
不然遇到武力旗鼓相当的对手时要怎么办？
印第安纳带着爽朗明媚的笑容，冲我挑了挑眉。
就在此时，阳光穿过天花板上的破洞，落入酒馆内。
柔软温和的淡色光芒笼罩住了印第安纳。
……嗯？太阳出来了？
她抬头看了眼阳光，又将目光落在了我身上。
阳光落在指挥官的身上，氛围好像还蛮好的……
……阳光拥抱着你……酒香萦绕……无处安放的悸动……唔……
你在说些什么？我听不清。
咳、咳咳……没什么！只是想到了一些不重要的东西……
等我写好了，再拿给你看……
……好了！指挥官，道具组刚刚联络我说就快到了！
我想了想，你还是先回去休息吧，剩下的交给我和她们就好。
毕竟我们之间的下一场对手可是夜戏，一点也不轻松哦！

心跳加速的清理工作.say: 要赶紧清理才行……
牛舍中，法戈正在清理地上打翻的牛奶。
法戈，有什么需要帮忙的吗？
指挥官……？
这种情境下，我应该表达惊讶的情绪，重新将惊讶情绪数值上调12.51%——
指挥官？！您为什么会在这里？
因为你来挤牛奶后，迟迟没有回去，我就来看看。
工作超时给大家带来的不便，我很抱歉。
好，我明白了。
……好，我明白了，谢谢您的关心。
记录指挥官此时的各项情绪数值，作为“担心”的样本之一。
回到刚刚指挥官的问题——我有什么需要您帮忙的吗？
如果可以的话，希望指挥官帮我一起清理打翻的牛奶。
好，我来帮你。
拿来了抹布，蹲下身去与法戈一起擦拭地上打翻的牛奶。
这个时候是不是应该露出笑容，以表达感谢？
一般来说是这样。
少女露出了淡淡的笑容，在阳光下越发柔软温暖。
但很快，难得的笑容就消失不见了。
——数据记录完毕。是难得的情绪样本积累。
感谢您，指挥官。对了，在休息之前，我还有一件事想要拜托您。
怎么了？
由于昨天劳作过度，我的胳膊现在很酸痛，现在无法很好地清理身上的痕迹。
我想拜托您帮我把身上的这些清理干净，可以么？
此时应将喜悦情绪继续调高1.27%，再表达感谢。
谢谢您，指挥官！
取来了干净的毛巾，为法戈仔细擦拭沾在身上的牛奶。
唔……指挥官……
仅有两人的空间中，少女一反常态地红了双颊。
怎么了？
我的心跳有些快，被您触碰到的皮肤温度也在上升……
根据以往的数据显示，这是害羞的表现……？
……需要我停下么？
……不，我想我现在并不希望你停下。

危情与心跳.say: （……这是凯尔圣的声音！）
朝着声音的方向赶去，来到了临时筑起的牛圈外，看到了这样的景象——
凯尔圣！
指、指挥官！呜呜——
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 请、请快点离开——！要、要是——呀——！！！
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 呜呜……要是受伤了，就、就不好了……停下——！
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: （这个情况来不及找支援了！）
凯尔圣，冷静一些！照我说的做！
呜呜……指挥官你说……呜……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 控制住自己的身体，不要踢到牛！
好、好，我试试……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 凯尔圣一步步照着我的指示做，牛的跳跃力度逐渐减弱。
推开牛圈的门，抱起角落里的干草，缓慢地靠近了牛。
指、指挥官……这孩子好像……冷静了一些……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 但你还是要小心一些……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 点点头，继续小心翼翼地靠近它，将干草放在了它面前。
又缓缓地退后，朝它伸出了手。
对峙了数分钟，牛终于停止了跳跃，用鼻子哼哼出气后，低头吃起了干草。
呼……呼……感谢指挥官，感谢鸢尾……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 慢慢走到牛身侧，朝惊魂未定、几乎脱力的凯尔圣伸出了手。
凯尔圣，没事了。
放开缰绳，慢慢下来，不要再惊动它了。

危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 少女颤抖着握住了我的手，但她没有即刻从牛背上下来。
指、指挥官，我还有些害怕……我的动作会不会又吓到它……？
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: ……没想到驯养动物竟能这么惊险……这、这难道是鸢尾的试炼么……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]
凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 凯尔圣长呼出一口气，开始了行动。
可她刚侧过身体——
……头好晕……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 凯尔圣！
指挥官，抱歉……可我真的没有力气了……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 凯尔圣从牛背上滑落，跌入了我的怀中。
她的身体因为惊吓而颤抖发烫，双手紧紧攥着我胸口的衣服。
没受伤就好，还站的起来么？
呜……稍微有点……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 没关系，我送你回去吧？
那就……麻烦指挥官了……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

危情与心跳.say: 嘿嘿……
危情与心跳.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 指挥官~这边。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 循着声音的方向看去，露天泳池中，一道熟悉的身影正坐在充气床上朝我打招呼。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 刚刚在祈祷的时候就期待与您相遇，没想到您真的就出现了……
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 呵呵，果然在幸运日的时候愿望很快就能实现呢。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 嗯，是的。而且根据预测的结果，今天还很适合约会……
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 约会？
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: {playername}

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 没、没什么……让您见笑了……///
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 欸……？指挥官的意思……觉得遇见我很幸运么……///？
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 嗯，毕竟我也是因为工作调整，才能这个时间回来休息。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: {playername}

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 在这种情况下偶遇伴尔维，也算是幸运。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: {playername}

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 啊……这样啊……说的也是呢……
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 说起来，指挥官最近都在忙拍电影的事吧。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 既然现在是休息时间，就请来我身边吧？在泳池里好好放松一下。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 踏入池水，立刻带来了一片凉意，驱赶了炎热带来的不适感。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 等坐到伴尔维身边时——
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 那、那个，指挥官，能麻烦您帮我拿一下草莓芭菲么？
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 刚刚一直只顾着看您了……芭菲融化得太快，有些滴到身上了……呜……
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 少女一手举着玻璃杯，另一只手试图擦拭着滴落在胸前的粘稠液体。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 我帮你拿着，你先清理吧。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: {playername}

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 谢谢指挥官……不过指挥官也要小心不要弄脏手哦……
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 从伴尔维手中接过玻璃杯后，少女再度开始了清理的动作。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: ……稍微有些不好意思……啊，也、也不是让您移开目光的意思……
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 唔，还是有些黏黏的……
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 少女一边说着，一边将手伸入泳池中捧了些水，洒在了自己的身上。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 轻薄的白色布料被水濡湿，以半透明的姿态紧紧包裹住少女的肌肤。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 呼……这样就清理干净了。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 待伴尔维清理干净，重新坐好后，将手中的草莓芭菲朝她递过去。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 这份草莓芭菲其实是我今日的幸运物品哦。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 少女接过芭菲后，有些羞涩地笑了笑，淡淡的红晕浮上她的面颊。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 那个……我希望能将这份幸运分享给指挥官。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 分享给我？
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: {playername}

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 嗯……就是……让我来喂您吃芭菲的意思……///
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 虽然这杯芭菲上面的部分有些融化了，但……这个味道，我想指挥官一定会喜欢的……
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 伴随着少女的靠近，冰淇淋与草莓的香甜一同在口中化开。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 如、如何呢……？这个味道……
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 这个味道，我确实很喜欢
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: {playername}

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 那、那就好……！
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 这个味道，我还想再品味一次。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: {playername}

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 指、指挥官……///
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

分享幸运的小憩时光.say: 之后与伴尔维一同享用着幸运草莓芭菲，共同度过了难得休闲的夏日午后。
分享幸运的小憩时光.actorName: 伴尔维 [清凉的甜蜜滋味]

夜色深处的温度.say: 来到泳池时，意外看到了正在这里休息的腓特烈大帝。
我的孩子，此时的相遇就是所谓的缘分么？
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 还是说，你来此处，就是为了来见我？
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 腓特烈大帝躺在充气床上，用手朝我的方向轻轻拨动着池水。
呵呵，你看起来确实有些疲倦，来我这里休息一会儿吧。
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 很好，我的孩子，我喜欢你的这份率直。
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 作为奖励，到我身边来吧。
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 稍微吃点樱桃，喝些饮料，放松一下。
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 她摇曳着杯中酒红色的液体，面色潮红，金色的双眸中带着湿润的笑意。
（这是醉了……？）
（这样的情况，让她独自在泳池中待着可不安全。）
腓特烈大帝，我先送你回房休息吧。
哦？我的孩子，你是在担心我么……？呵呵……
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 无需担心，我并没有醉。
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 看，今夜的烟火表演开始了，到我身边来吧，一同欣赏这美景。
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 依言走到了她的身边。
傻傻地站着做什么？还是不放心么？
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 那就试试吧，酒精浓度并不高。
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 腓特烈大帝朝我递来了高脚杯，上面还印着浅色的唇印。
接过高脚杯，就着唇印喝了一口。
或许有更直接的方式，满足你的欲望，呵呵……
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 接过高脚杯，换了个位置喝了一口。
你这是在害羞么？呵呵……
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 嗯……的确不可能让你醉倒，刚刚看你脸很红，我还以为……
啊，这里日间阳光太晒，风沙也比我预想中大得多，皮肤敏感才会发红吧。
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 腓特烈大帝换了个姿势，身上半透的黑纱摇曳，半遮掩着她白皙的肌肤。
为何这般看着我？是想吃樱桃了吗？
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 正想开口，腓特烈大帝却先一步将鲜红欲滴的樱桃递到我的嘴边。
很甜的，没有核，试试看吧。
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 张开嘴，吃下樱桃后，鲜甜的气味仍在口中萦绕。
……我刚刚是想说，夜里比较凉快，注意别着凉。
被你这么一说，倒是有几分凉意。
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 腓特烈大帝并没有将衣物整理好，而是轻轻拍了拍自己身边空出的位置。
来我身边躺下，与我分享肌肤的温热吧……
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 夜空中绚烂的烟火绽放，池水摇曳着旖旎的光。
我的孩子，在夏夜结束前……
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

夜色深处的温度.say: 于我的怀中，尽情地撒娇吧……
夜色深处的温度.actorName: 腓特烈大帝 [相会于盛夏之夜]

sequence: 在这片荒野中，有座曾经繁华一时的小镇。
镇上的酒馆里飘着果汁味，那儿的厨师烤制的菠萝披萨也是一绝。
她们说那个小镇有诅咒。
要我说，那个镇上有故事。
毕竟，我就是在那里遇见了传说中的「指挥官」。
——节选自《西部回忆录：序章》，大黄蜂著

沙尘中的相遇.say: 干枯的草团随着风的轨迹来到脚边，身旁的马匹凑近后打了个响鼻，又是一副无精打采的模样。
你也累了么？
不过马儿并不会回答问题，耳畔依旧只有呼啸的风，还有——
大黄蜂，在今天太阳落山之前，你就会和这片沙地融为一体。
是么？我希望你已经写好遗嘱了，鲱鱼。
我要让你知道，谁才是这里唯一的“快枪手”。
话语声打破了荒原之上的宁静与萧瑟。
循着话音传来的方向望去，两名少女对峙着，俨然处于一场决斗之中。
即使在陌生的地界，也总要有一些冒险精神存在。
不靠近的话就无法确定对方是敌是友，不是么？
贸然接近两个决斗的牛仔并不是什么明智的选择。
就在如此思考着，牵着身旁早已疲倦的马匹行进的时候——
站住！
就站在那里，别动。你也不想胸前多几个窟窿，对吧？
没错，乖乖把手举高，站在那里。也别试图拔枪，因为我会比你更快。
（这种情况下还是先不和她们起冲突为好，听她们的吧。）
看到我将双手抬起后，两名少女冲彼此点了点头，向我靠近。
名为鲱鱼的少女直接将手伸向了我的腰间，将我的左轮掏出后丢给了一旁的大黄蜂。
抱歉，你知道的。在这种地方总归是小心为好。
我理解，不过它确实陪伴了我很长一段时间。
希望你们在确认这份不存在的威胁解除之后，早点将它还给我。
别那么着急嘛，陌生人！总之让我先把你的子弹……
嗯？这个标志……范德赖特帮 (Van der Light Gang)？！
什么？这家伙是范德赖特帮的成员么？
不会有错，枪上的这个标记能证明这家伙的身份。
不过我记得……传言中只有这个帮派的创始人——「指挥官」的标记在枪上……
也、也就是说……我们面前这个家伙很可能就是那个凭借自己的实力和智慧在最荒蛮的地方站稳了脚跟，
成为一个传奇后又很快销声匿迹的，大名鼎鼎的「指挥官」！？
（……剧本里没写出来，原来给我的是这种背景设定么。）
咳咳，那个，你是「指挥官」本人吗？
就算你否认，我们也不会相信的啦！
没错！你一定就是指挥官！
可以吗？那就麻烦你——等、等一下，这里也没有纸和笔吧！
果然还是得去小镇上才行能让你给我签个名啊……
不过，指挥官为什么会来到这里？
在回答你的问题之前，我可以先问一下你们刚刚是为什么在决斗么？
哦，就是想和她分个高下而已，比一比谁拔枪的速度更快。
不过已经不重要了，对吧，大黄蜂？
没错没错~！眼下更重要的是……指挥官，你要不要加入我们？
我在开始这段旅程的时候，已经发誓不会再加入任何帮派了，也不想再卷入这些争斗。
啊哈哈哈，你误会了！我们不是来拉拢你加入什么帮派的。
指挥官，你看到了么，前面的那座小镇。
顺着少女手指所指的方向，隐约可以从沙尘中看到建筑的痕迹。
那里有比帮派争斗有趣数十倍的事情哦~？
嗯？
说话间，方才还晴朗的天空便开始转暗。
原本萧瑟的风开始了咆哮，远方的沙尘即将席卷而来。
不好……又是沙尘暴。
最近这里的沙尘暴多得有些不正常……算了，指挥官，你的马还能跑么？
能。
那就骑上你的马，用最快的速度冲到那个镇子里找个避难所吧！
指挥官，我们镇上见！
她们冲我挥了挥手，然后骑上了被她们拴在一旁的马，顷刻间消失在扬起的沙尘之中。
……我也不能犹豫了。
翻身上马，捋了捋它的鬃毛，用力夹住了马镫。
向着沙尘中的小镇义无反顾地冲了过去。

兔子、金矿与诅咒.say: 在遮天蔽日的沙尘真正袭来前顺利赶到了小镇之中。
不过家家户户此刻都门窗紧闭，在昏暗的天色中也无法辨别哪处才是镇上的旅店。
先就近找户人家避一避吧。
抬手正要敲响左边这户的门时，门却打开了一条缝。
无论怎么敲门，始终无人回应。
只有八音盒的声音隐约透过门缝传来。
就在这时，左边那户人家的门扉突然打开了一条缝隙。
陌生的外乡人……进来吧。
在一片漆黑的室内，房屋主人手中的煤油灯是唯一的光源。
咳咳…我是布里斯托尔。外乡人，你也是被悬赏吸引来的么？
悬赏？
（莫非这就是鲱鱼之前说的，比帮派争斗有趣数十倍的事么？）
看你的反应，你是知道这里有事发生……但不知道具体是什么，对吧？
就让我来告诉你，有关这个小镇、有关悬赏、有关诅咒的故事——
数十年前，小镇，矿洞内。
……还要继续往里面埋炸药么？好累啊。
岩石阻碍了继续开采金矿什么的，让别人来搞定不就好了么……
用足够多的炸药，快点把岩石炸开就行了吧。我放……好了，我要睡了。
虽然很想问问这个角色身份是不是给错了……但总之不可以在这种危险的地方睡觉啦！
快起来，姐姐我要执行爆破操作了哦！
倒计时——
迪普莱克斯……等、等等！帝国好像放太多炸——
三、二、一……
砰、噼啪碰——
伴随着爆炸声，超量的炸药让岩石崩裂滚落，将矿工们的身影吞没。
啊……我诅咒……诅咒开采金矿，诅咒劳动……
我也诅咒……只要是碰了这里的金子的人，就会变成只会睡觉的兔子……
为什么是兔子？
……毕竟兔子比较可爱嘛。
哦我们好像杀青了欸，终于可以休息了……
……这个诅咒听起来好像有点随便。
咳咳、总之从矿洞坍塌的那一天起，诅咒就开始在这里蔓延了……！
布里斯托尔说着，将我拉到了房屋中的另一处所在。
看吧，外乡人！那里的白兔，就是活生生的例证。
煤油灯散发出幽幽的光，将小隔间照亮。
……这个角色……拉菲喜欢……
……zZZZ……
这是？
这只在睡觉的兔子，是现任镇长圣地亚哥的侄女，拉菲。
她不相信诅咒的存在，前往了矿洞，然后就变成了这样……
正因如此，镇长才开始发悬赏，以期有能之士平息矿洞中的遇难的幽灵。
嗯……被幽灵诅咒的金矿么……
我陷入思考的模样被布里斯托尔错误地当做了是产生了兴趣。
她在看了一眼窗外后，将我推往屋外。
再会，希望你在这场混乱中找到你的价值——「指挥官」。
等等！
布里斯托尔并未理会我的话语，砰的一声将房门紧闭。
在一阵让人无法睁开双眼的狂风席卷而来之后，沙尘暴停息了。
再度睁开双眼时，眼前的房屋早已变换了另外的模样。
嗯……？刚刚这里是这样么？普通的民房变成了酒馆……？
伴随我冲入小镇的马匹此刻正悠闲地在酒馆后方的马厩中嚼着草料。
但我却并没有将它牵入马厩的记忆。
拎着煤油灯的布里斯托尔、神秘的沉睡白兔顷刻间消失的无影无踪。
仿佛刚刚的一切都只是一场幻觉。
……总之先进这间酒馆看看吧。

酒馆中的情报.say: 推门走入酒馆后，是少女热情的问候声。
欢迎光临~！我是这里的女招待贝尔。
总之先坐下来喝点什么吧~！菜单在这里，有什么需要随时叫我哦~
贝尔将破破烂烂的手写菜单塞到我手中后，就端着托盘手忙脚乱地穿行在酒馆之中。
哟！指挥官！你怎么才来？我和鲱鱼在这里等你好久了。
快来这边坐！
熟悉的身影冲我招手，就在准备前往她身旁坐下时——
嗯？大黄蜂，你叫这家伙……「指挥官」？
「指挥官」？呵呵……看来这个悬赏吸引来了不得了的家伙呢。
自我介绍一下，我是印第安纳。是个赏金猎人。
我为了破除这个小镇上有关金矿的诅咒而来的……你有没有兴趣入我的伙？
就我们两个解决这件事。报酬我四你六，就当交个朋友，怎么样？
这么快就想拉拢「指挥官」……是当我不存在么~？
匹兹堡，你不是对这个悬赏不感兴趣么？
哎呀，我只是说我对解决小镇的诅咒不感兴趣，可没说过对指挥官不感兴趣~
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: 少女坐在桌沿，状似不经意地把玩着手中的左轮。
喂喂喂，你们至少搞清楚一下状况好不好！
是我和鲱鱼两个先和指挥官约好了的！对吧，指挥官！
喏~就连指挥官本人也这么承认了，你们就死了这条心比较好哦~？
哈！？这么快就不记得我们了吗？
总之指挥官已经被我们预定了！你们要拉人入伙的话，这里不是还有的是人么？
就是啊！我看坐在那边喝茶的修女就很适合加入你们哦！
大黄蜂说着，随便往酒馆的角落中一指。
我这才发现这间小小的酒馆中不单单是人满为患，更是“卧虎藏龙”。
（修女、女仆、女巫……？）
（职业是不是有点混杂的太多了？？）
呵呵，我对于指挥官入谁的伙这件事倒是不介意……印第安纳，你呢~？
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: 你的计划可是第一步就失败了哦~
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: 无所谓。既然不能作为合作的同伴，就只做为竞争对手了！
不过我有自信成为这里第一个拿到奖金的人，诅咒也好、幽灵也好，就统统用我手里的枪粉碎吧！
少女发出了一阵爽朗的笑声，随后走过来拍了拍我的肩。
虽说现在是竞争对手，但还是希望有机会和你合作，指挥官。
哎~你就把人还给大黄蜂和鲱鱼她们吧~
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: 正好~我也就当认识一下新朋友。
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: 匹兹堡从桌沿边轻巧地跃下，抓住我的胳膊后往大黄蜂所在的方向一推。
啧……来了个更麻烦的家伙啊。
放心，我对解除诅咒之类的不感兴趣，只是想见识一下你们和指挥官的行动罢了~
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: 话是这么说啦！但其实我们自己也没想好要怎么办……
而且最近沙尘暴还这么频繁，想出去调查也很难。
也就只有这里的披萨能给我一点安慰……果然！披萨还是菠萝的好吃啊！
她说着咬了一大口手中的披萨，随即便有几道愤懑的目光投注了过来。
我觉得在夸披萨的时候还是稍微注意下措辞比较好……
欸？虽然不理解是为什么……但既然是指挥官说的……那我下次注意好了！
不过要是再这么住下去，我的家底就要耗干净了。
我也一样。要是没办法拿到悬赏承诺的奖金，可能之后只能去抢了……
你们在这里待了很久么，连钱都花光了？
久等了——匹兹堡小姐，这是您要的五杯混合口味果汁，一共是1000金币哦~！
稍后吧台结给你。
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: 好嘞~！
贝尔适时插入的报价声让疑问有了解答。
喏，这个物价，可不是一般人能消费的起哦。
这镇子上的物价一直这么离谱么？
不知道啊！反正我被这个解除诅咒的悬赏吸引来的时候就是这个物价了。
没关系，指挥官如果手头紧的话，可以花我的……
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: 匹兹堡仰头喝完一杯果汁，然后带着几分微醺之意贴到了我身边。
咳，谢谢你的好意，不过这个就免了。
这是在害羞么？真是可爱的反应……
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: 算了，不逗你了。镇上的物价并不是一直都这么高的。
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: 是在镇长圣地亚哥发出悬赏、沙尘暴开始变得格外频繁之后才突然升高的哦~
酒馆中的情报.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

酒馆中的情报.say: （嗯？又是“沙尘暴变得格外频繁”这一点……）
话说回来，这个诅咒……就只有镇长圣地亚哥的侄女拉菲被诅咒变成了兔子么？
在拉菲之前，还有其他人受到过这个所谓的“诅咒”么？
有哦！是几十年前，那场矿难发生后不久第一个前往矿洞调查的人——布里斯托尔。
酒馆中的女招待不知何时停留在了我们的座位旁边。
布里斯托尔？
（在那场沙尘暴中为我敞开房门的人也叫做布里斯托尔……这是某种巧合，还是……）
布里斯托尔在矿洞中神秘失踪了，大着胆子去寻找她的人只在矿洞附近找到了一只兔子。
小镇上就没有人再靠近矿洞……没有人敢去淘金，镇子也就慢慢变得萧条起来了。
直到前不久，拉菲小姐也是因为想帮忙改变小镇的命运，想证明没有诅咒存在，所以才……
不过我其实才搬到这个小镇上不久，这些历史也都是U-556告诉我的。
如果你们好奇的话……啊，再过一会儿，U-556就要送东西来了，你们可以直接去问她哦！

拼凑的线索.say: 幽灵的诅咒、同名的“布里斯托尔”、高昂的物价、变得频繁的沙尘暴。
数个关键词缠绕在一起，在隐约有些头绪的时候又重新混杂成一团。
在等待贝尔口中的U-556来送东西的这段时间，我提出要在这附近转转后便从酒馆内离开了。
走出酒馆后，随手揭下一张小镇中张贴的有关解除诅咒的悬赏令，试图从中获取一些有价值的信息。
“成功解决诅咒问题者……本镇愿给出金矿收益的五分之一。”
（这么看来，连赏金本身也只是一个承诺，而非实打实的收益……）
（而且如果真的急着解决诅咒，那应该对赏金猎人们提供一些优惠。）
（而不是像现在这样收取如此高昂的食宿费用……）
请、请小心呀呀呀——！快躲开呜呜呜……！
少女慌乱的尖叫声突然响起，打断了我的思考。
我这才发现自己不知何时走到了牧场附近，周围的奶牛安静地吃着草，除了——
呜、呜呜……请帮帮凯尔圣……
牛背上的少女努力保持着平衡，想要不被甩下去。
好、好厉害……！只靠眼神就让它停下来了！
拼凑的线索.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

拼凑的线索.say: 掏出腰间的左轮手枪，对着草地射了几发子弹。
哇……是察觉到危险了么……居然安静下来了！
拼凑的线索.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

拼凑的线索.say: 顺利解除了危机后，少女不住地向我表达着谢意。
举手之劳。不过，你是怎么跑到它背上去的……？
那、那个，因为在给它们更换草料的时候，这孩子不知道怎么就突然暴躁起来了……
拼凑的线索.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

拼凑的线索.say: 我想让它冷静下来，结果被它甩到了背上……呜……
拼凑的线索.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

拼凑的线索.say: 草料？这些草料和它们平时吃的一样么？
这个……凯尔圣只负责把草料带过来铺给它们吃，其他的事情得去问法戈小姐呢。
拼凑的线索.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

拼凑的线索.say: 好吧，那你说的那个法戈小姐，她现在在哪里？
她就在那边哦——
拼凑的线索.actorName: 凯尔圣 [神圣的怜悯并非恶事？]

拼凑的线索.say: 顺着名为凯尔圣的牧场少女的指引，来到了附近的牛棚之中。
检测到名为「指挥官」的个体靠近，将开心的情绪数值上调25.22%。
启用“亲切友好”模式——
你好呀，指挥官~
看你的表情，应该是在好奇我是如何得知你的身份的吧？哈哈~我也有自己的秘密哦。
好吧……那我就不追问这个了。你方便告诉我牧场中用的草料是否和平时的一样么？
一样哦，自从沙尘暴开始出现后，这里的物资供给就只能依赖U-556了。
草料也是她帮忙送过来的呢。
又是U-556么……
啊，不过昨天她送过来的草料不够用，我就自己又去收割了一点混在里面哦。
——从矿洞周围。
指挥官，你怎么在这里？
熟悉的声音在身后响起。
印第安纳？
我就说怎么匹兹堡她们会突然拜托我来找人……原来是法戈把你拖住了。
不，我什么都没做。单纯在回答指挥官的问题罢了。
少女亲切友好的语调又突然恢复了最初的毫无情绪起伏。
嗯？
没什么……反正法戈现在是个无害的家伙。
走吧，匹兹堡她们要等急了。
重新回到了酒馆附近，大黄蜂等人便熟络地和印第安纳聊起天来。
你们不是争夺悬赏的竞争对手么？
什么“你们”，明明是“我们”！
哈哈哈哈，虽然我们现在是竞争对手，但我也不认为就应该剑拔弩张。
没错哟~这里的环境，比指挥官以前面对的环境要更松弛一些呢……
拼凑的线索.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

拼凑的线索.say: 就在闲聊的时候，马蹄声响了起来。
驰骋于旷野的牛仔骑士——U-556，前来送货了！
在镇上其他人陆续把所需物品从U-556的马车上搬下来后，我找准时机前去和少女搭话。
U-556运送货物的身姿真是飒爽！
嘿嘿，一般一般。你是才来这镇上的人吧。
外乡人在这里这么好辨别么？
是啊。小镇的原住民已经没多少了，除了少数几个刚搬到这里生活的人以外，
剩下的都是因为镇长发出的悬赏令才来的外乡人。
不过这样也算是好事吧……总算是改善了镇上的经济状况呢。
哈？你们这镇子也太黑心了吧……！
就仗着现在沙尘暴频发，我们走不了就乱收费么！
特殊情况，也不能怪我们吧！
明明这里原来也没有沙尘暴……都是你们来了，惹怒了幽灵才会变成这样。
等一下，U-556，你说这里原来没有沙尘暴？
对哦，是第一批赏金猎人来了以后，这附近才开始出现沙尘暴的。
而且来的人越多，沙尘暴就越频繁。依我看就是彻底惹怒幽灵了啦！
U-556无意透露的信息，让一个模糊的想法在脑海中渐渐浮现。
也许……我们应该去直接接触一下所谓的“诅咒”了。

幽灵的复仇？.say: 在做出决定后，印第安纳提议重新回到酒馆之中做计划。
你怎么自然而然就加入我们的团队讨论了……？
跟着你们好像更有趣一些！而且这个悬赏听起来好像有古怪。
的确有古怪。在你们来到这个小镇之前，应该还有所谓的“第一批赏金猎人”。
这些人去哪里了？以及……为什么你们来了小镇这么久，却一无所获？
欸？对哦……我们来的时候怎么完全没有意识到这一点。
还有，为什么总是待在镇子上因为一些莫名其妙的事情没有去调查……？
这么一说的话，确实有一些奇怪之处。
每当我下定决心要行动时，总会冒出一些其它的念头，然后便不了了之。
呵呵……这就是为什么我对这个悬赏没有兴趣的原因呢。
幽灵的复仇？.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

幽灵的复仇？.say: 嗯？把你知道的内幕说出来吧，匹兹堡。
很可惜，我并没有掌握比你更多的情报。我也只是隐约察觉了这个小镇有诡异之处。
幽灵的复仇？.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

幽灵的复仇？.say: 金矿中的幽灵、变成兔子、莫名会被改变的想法，每次想要离开时就会刮起的沙尘暴……
幽灵的复仇？.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

幽灵的复仇？.say: 指挥官，你说，到底哪一个才是真正的诅咒？
幽灵的复仇？.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

幽灵的复仇？.say: 又或者……它们全都是？
幽灵的复仇？.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

幽灵的复仇？.say: 匹兹堡压低了声音，红色的眸子里流转着我看不懂的妖冶色彩。
虽然不知道为什么你没有受到这里的影响……
幽灵的复仇？.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

幽灵的复仇？.say: 但总之还是先说说你的计划吧，指·挥·官。
幽灵的复仇？.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

幽灵的复仇？.say: 明白了，我和匹兹堡就留在这里准备接应。
唉，还以为你会带上我呢，没想到居然会这么狠心，让我们留在这儿。
幽灵的复仇？.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

幽灵的复仇？.say: 算了算了~那就祝你们今晚的行动顺利。
幽灵的复仇？.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

幽灵的复仇？.say: 入夜后，我和鲱鱼、大黄蜂开始了行动。
奇怪，明明想要知道矿洞所在的方位一点也不难，为什么之前那么多天我压根没想起过这件事？
话说回来，我突然意识到，自从我们来到这个镇上……也一直没看见过镇长圣地亚哥？
对哦！怎么连这么重要的事情我都忘了！
嘘——我们快到了。
说话间，我们抵达了矿洞附近。
四周荒草丛生，能看到明显被镰刀收割过的痕迹。
（看来法戈的确没有说谎。不过这里的荒草到底是有什么不一样么……）
仔细检查了一番后，发现靠近矿洞门口的草杆上，附着着一点点黑色的痕迹。
（这个黑色的痕迹会是导致那场意外的原因么……？）
（看来只能深入这个矿洞内才会有答案了。）
咳，指挥官……那个，我们……真的要进去么？
万一诅咒真的存在，我们变成了兔子的话……要怎么办啊？
指挥官既然敢来，应该就证明诅咒不存在吧！
你看！指挥官的回答充满了决心！
呃……这种时候，犹豫不太好吧？
？？指挥官，你是认真的么？
总之不管诅咒是否存在，这个矿洞里还肯定有其它的秘密。
你们也不想被一直困在这个小镇里吧？
说的也是啦……
那就跟我一起进去吧。
昏暗潮湿的废弃矿洞中，狭窄的隧道蜿蜒延伸。
大黄蜂手持着一盏小小的煤油灯，走在前方。
哈啊……我们已经走了这么久了，还是什么东西都没遇到，怎么感觉要无功而返了。
就在鲱鱼发出了一声小小的抱怨后，前方的某条隧道中传出了隐约的交谈声。
大黄蜂心领神会地熄灭了手中的煤油灯后，我们小心翼翼地朝着交谈声传出的方向靠近。
欸……这样真的能行么？
当然喵，圣地亚哥镇长请放心喵~
可是拉菲她……真的没问题吗，明石？
请相信明石喵~变成白兔是拉菲小姐自愿的喵，而且小镇的经济不是越来越好了嘛。
说的也是呢！人来得越来越多了！小镇迟早有一天会恢复原来的闪亮~！
喵呼呼……没错没错，明石也能赚得盆满钵满！
就再加大一点功率吧喵~沙尘暴的幻境再频繁一点，让所有人都离不开这里喵~
话说，除了沙尘暴之外。你在水源和食物里加的那个药物，不会有什么副作用吧？
当然不会了喵~明石出品必属精品喵！
其实只是配合一些暗示就能让大家做梦的无害用品喵~诅咒之类的传言能顺利散播就是多亏了它喵~
圣地亚哥就能以你的名义让小镇继续蒸蒸日上喵~！
太感谢你了~！明石！当初同意你来做生意果然是个明智的选择！
喵呼呼，明石喵！
不远处的隧道被布置成了工坊的模样。
工坊中满是看不出用途的机器，而其中绿色的猫咪熟稔地操作着它们。
而混杂在这些机器中间的，还有一座牢笼。
红发的少女正坐在笼中，心情颇好地哼着歌。
（这就是现任镇长圣地亚哥？她为什么会被关在这里？）
（这只叫做明石的猫又是怎么一回事？她的机器就是引发这一切的元凶么？）
咦……？怎么总感觉有股视线。嘿呀，我看——！
笼中的圣地亚哥突然站了起来，正巧和我四目相对。
啊，明石！有客人哦——！

新的旅程.say: 奔跑在狭窄潮湿的隧道之中，后方是穷追不舍的、来自明石的追兵。
呼…呼……！也就是说……
沙尘暴也好、诅咒也好、还是我们会忘记这些事情也好，全都是算计好的？！
……金矿什么的果然是骗人的！只是为了把我们留在这里，榨取油水。
这样一来没有钱又离不开的话，就只能留在这个小镇上生活了……
哇，真是好算计……
不过既然沙尘暴只是明石利用机器做出来的幻境的话……就不用担心了。
在临近出口时，终于顺利甩开了明石的追兵。
总之先回去告诉匹兹堡她们吧！早点离开这个奇怪的地方！
嗯。
将在矿洞中的所见所闻向匹兹堡等人和盘托出。
——戳破了这个小镇的秘密，已经不能再在这里待下去了。
没错喵！明石要把你们一网打尽喵！
绿色猫咪不知何时出现在了酒馆之中，身旁全都是她在矿洞工坊中派出来追击我们的“追兵”。
明石怎么可能没有第二手准备喵！
整个小镇的地下都被明石修出了通道喵，就为了第一时间阻止你们这种得知秘密的人离开喵！
那就是要开打的意思咯？
就是这样喵！
求之不得，放马过来吧！
印第安纳话音刚落，枪声便在酒馆内炸响。
匹兹堡和印第安纳两人的动作快如闪电，同时拔出了各自的左轮手枪。
准备好了吗，指挥官？
随时……！
砰！砰！
两声枪响几乎同时响起，明石派出的两个“追兵”应声倒地。
连带着酒馆中的桌椅也倒做一团。
呜……希望之后算损失的时候不要亏太多……
我建议找匹兹堡索赔。
我的风头居然都被印第安纳给抢了……不行，不能被小看了啊！
那就趁这个机会比比谁更快吧！
正合我意——！
我早就受不了这里的菠萝披萨了！
新的旅程.factiontag: 为正统披萨而战的食客A

新的旅程.say: 为了披萨的正统口味而战！
新的旅程.factiontag: 为正统披萨而战的食客B

新的旅程.say: 枪战点燃了矛盾的引线，酒馆中其他人也开始了混战。
子弹在空中划出一道道的轨迹，酒瓶碎裂声、桌椅倒塌声不绝于耳。
当最后一声枪响落下，黎明已至，酒馆中也重归平静。
喵……是明石输了喵……
按照这里的规矩，我应该把你交给镇长……不过……
不过听起来，镇长好像也是和你一伙的？虽然她被骗了。
新的旅程.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

新的旅程.say: 这样就有点难办了……
发生了这种事情，肯定会重新选举一个新镇长的吧？
你把明石交给新镇长处理不就好了么！
明石喵~！
还有许多商机等待着明石去发掘喵……！
这话就留着和新镇长说吧~
新的旅程.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

新的旅程.say: 匹兹堡一边说着，一边系紧了明石手腕上的绳子。
指挥官呢，接下来有什么打算？
还用问么~？新镇长的人选肯定非指挥官莫属啊~
新的旅程.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

新的旅程.say: 说的也是哦！如果是指挥官当镇长的话，这里一定会成为传奇小镇吧~
正因如此，我才不能留在这里。
欸？
迟早有一天你会明白的。
将目光投向远方。阳光之下，小镇中曾经破败的房屋似乎焕发出了新的生机。
指挥官，你真的要走？
新的旅程.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

新的旅程.say: 还有其它地方在等待着，不是么？
呵呵，没错……那就祝你好运了，「指挥官」。
新的旅程.actorName: 匹兹堡 [斟酒女郎的赌局]

新的旅程.say: 再会，「指挥官」。
从印第安纳手中接过缰绳，熟练地翻身上马。
轻轻一踢马腹后，它便向前小跑起来。
小镇的轮廓渐渐消失在身后，而前方的道路依旧漫长而未知。
但是，那又有什么关系呢？

sequence: 「沙尘、谎言与诅咒」·FIN

The Port Goes West.say: Port - Office
Vacation season has come again! Where should we go this time?
That's a tricky question. Our list of destinations grows smaller with each year.
As long as there's a place to sleep, I can vacation anywhere... Zzz...
How about something special this time? Y'know, a place where you can experience something exciting and unique!
Scuba diving is an option. Think about it – diving into the deep sea, uncovering mysteries...
Did someone say MYSTERIES? Where? Tell me now!
I was just kidding... There are no mysteries in the deep sea, only danger.
Our destination's gotta be something fun but also safe for the Commander's sake.
Many shipgirls have gathered in one place to earnestly discuss vacation destinations.
Hmm... Commander, it doesn't feel like this conversation is going anywhere.
It really isn't. Like you said earlier, though, there aren't many destinations to choose from.
Heehee. Unable to reach a consensus on where to go on vacation, are you?
Pittsburgh walks in through the office door, holding an envelope between her index and middle finger. She waves it around to get my attention.
Go on, open it. I think it'll solve your problem just like that.
She hands me the envelope, and I open it. The first thing that jumps out at me is the familiar handwriting, simultaneously neat and yet casual.
"At this point, you're presumably all having trouble deciding where to go on vacation."
"We thought you'd like something different, something new, so you are all invited to the resort town of Parisek. Signed: Indiana and Enterprise."
A resort town, eh? I wonder where it is!
Sounds like it has comfy beds...
Parisek... That name sounds familiar.
Have you heard it somewhere before?
We came up with the name ourselves. If it sounds familiar, you're probably imaginin' it.
Parisek... Palisade?
Actually... Never mind.
Let's get back on topic, shall we?
I get the idea! The resort is in the Eagle Union, so we can expect to have soda, popcorn, and burgers hand-fed to us by robots!
Err... No. As I was saying... You all liked that Sakuran hot spring resort, right? Well, there was the drama with the Youkai Troupe, but let's ignore that.
Ever since then, we've been planning an opportunity for you to experience some good ol' Eagle Union culture.
So we set up this resort town in secret, and now it's finally time to tell you all about it.
Ooh! So we're DEFINITELY talking about a place with robots that'll hand-feed us soda, popcorn, and burgers!
Give it a rest, Fu Shun!
Reinforcing stereotypes is very rude, whether or not they have any basis in reality!
You said, "good old" Eagle Union culture. Are we talking about the Wild West?
Ding-ding-ding. That's correct.
Just like how the Sakura Empire is synonymous with hot springs, the Eagle Union is synonymous with the Wild West.
Ooh. Are we gonna get to see a real frontier town?
Brilliant! I'm gonna take SO many photos!
We've got Fargo to thank for mostly takin' care of the logistics. Without her, I doubt we'd have finished on schedule!
It is my mission and sincere desire to provide my clients with only the finest service.
At the first sign of praise, Fargo takes out a business card and presents it.
We're a new company, and I'm currently the owner and the sole employee. Still, please do consider becoming our business partner in the future.
So your logistics company only just became incorporated, nya. Nyahaha... You should consider signing a long-term contract with me, nya.
Dammit, she got the first word in again! Fargo, I just wanna ask if you'd consider doin' delivery for seasonal fruits and veggies!
The next moment, Fargo is surrounded by potential business partners.
While I hope they can work out some sort of deal, I have more pertinent matters to talk about.
So, how exactly do we get to this resort town?
Don't you worry 'bout that. Enterprise has reserved a plane that can come pick us up as early as tomorrow!
If you're raring to go, I suggest you start packin'!
Yippee! I can't wait to see the western prairies, feel the cool winds... and explore mysterious gold mines and cursed estates!
Heehee. Also, I'm going to be your tour guide this time.
Pittsburgh comes closer to me.
I promise you it's gonna be an unforgettable adventure♪
I accept the invitation, and the girls all start beaming with excitement at the idea of visiting a frontier town.
Filled with anticipation, they return to their rooms and start packing their belongings.
The following morning, we all board the plane together with Pittsburgh.
Sometime later...
So tired... I was so excited I barely got any sleep last night...
Yes, but we're almost there. It's starting to look like the Wild West down there.
You're right! I can already picture it. Wooden buildings, a saloon, and cowgirls! Soon!
The girls chat about the upcoming adventure while the plane slowly descends.
Once the door opens, however, the only thing we're greeted by is an endless, barren prairie.
Hey, where's the town? I don't see a dang thing!
Oops... I, uh, might have had too much juice yesterday and I forgot to tell you...
We wanted you to get the full Wild West experience, which means finding an unsettled stretch of land to colonize before the vacation can truly begin.
So you mean WE have to colonize it?
You withheld information just so you could exploit us for free labor!
I-it's okay... I'll work twice as hard for you, Commander...
Come on, it's obvious she was joking. You're all so easily duped!
Heehee. Yes, sorry if I upset anyone. In reality, this place is just a temporary airfield.
The actual town is a short train ride away. Come with me.
Following Pittsburgh's lead, we walk to the train tracks and board the resort express.
Get ready, because the real vacation is about to start.

Suddenly, Gunshots.say: Aboard the express...
Readings indicate that everyone's collective happiness index is 67.11% higher than usual.
I suppose the act of going on vacation has that effect on you.
If I want to blend in, I should raise my own happiness index accordingly.
At the same time, I'll also increase my pleasure index by an appropriate 23.64%.
No, no, Fargo, you're doing it all wrong!
This one has ample vacation experience. You can use that for reference instead!
Adjusting values does not equate with true understanding of emotions.
Analysis: You must study emotions just as I did.
If you want to go about it more efficiently, I think I can help you with that.
By overwriting her emotional understanding with a program? Hardly an ideal solution.
No, Fargo, what you should do is study this one's emotion module. It is handy... even if it overheats easily.
I gaze out the window at the Wild West scenery passing by while overhearing the girls chattering merrily amongst themselves.
Some others, though, aren't in such a merry mood.
Uggghhh... It makes me SO anxious when I remember that my workload is gonna INCREASE during this vacation...
But at the same time, if I don't take my work with me, I'll never get to enjoy some time with the Commander...
I can empathize to a painful degree. Still, you should just focus on enjoying the present.
Trust me – the last thing you should do is let work spoil your vacation!
Yeah... You're right.
I can do overtime or all-nighters for weeks once I'm back at the port! Vacations are for relaxing!
Attagirl!
Hey, folks, we're almost there now.
Pittsburgh strolls down the train corridor and announces that we'll be arriving shortly.
Already? It feels like we only boarded a minute ago.
This is a short-distance express train, so yeah.
The reason why we boarded a train to begin with was so you could soak in the western mood for a while first.
Ah. It's no wonder the train was dressed in period-appropriate furnishings inside and out.
It even has that classic steam whistle...
Exactly. If you're gonna call something a Wild West vacation, you've got to go all out to make everything match the theme.
Hey, is that why you've been sitting here all by yourself? Because you were taking in all the details?
If so, I've got something way more interesting for you to look at.
With a cheeky smile, Pittsburgh takes the empty seat next to me. I immediately pick up a sweet, fruity smell coming from her.
Is that juice I smell?
Oopsies, I gave it away! Don't tell Indiana and Enterprise or they'll fry my bacon, okay?
FWEEE! FWEEE!
Before I can say anything else, the train's steam whistle cuts me off.
I look out the window again. At the end of the black train tracks bisecting the wilderness, I see the outline of a small town sticking out in the night.
Looks like we'll be there any minute now.
Yeah, but–
BANG!
BANG! BANG! POW!
(Was that... gunshots?)
We're settling this right here, right now! Only one gang gets to rule this town, buddy!
Who went and made them the rules? Screw that, let's team up and squeeze the townsfolk dry instead!
Two riders on horseback gallop by outside the window.
Hey, that's not a bad idea...
You, the Commander! Fork over your valuables now! Or else...
(This has got to be some kind of farce. No matter – I'll play along for now.)
Or else... what?
Or else you're getting a li'l present from me! Mwah!
The moment she blows me a kiss, the train starts to shake violently.
What was that? Did you plant bombs on the train?
Hahaha! Who doesn't love a good explosion, right?
Hurry up! Leave your valuables behind then get off the train!
Doing as told, I leave my baggage on the train, after which Herring escorts us to the town... for some reason.
We pass through the smoke and dust raised by the explosions and the gunfight, and the town finally reveals itself in full.
To little surprise, we find Indiana and friends waiting for us at the town's entrance, all with warm smiles on their faces.
Alright, that's the end of our bit. Welcome, folks, to the frontier resort town of Parisek!
Hahaha! Good that you finally made it.
So, how'd you like the act? It's as Wild West as it gets, right?
While it's not as wild as I imagined the Wild West would be, it was still a decent opener.
I've not had such a unique welcome in a while. My hat's off to whoever came up with that.
Hear that, Enterprise? I told you the Commander would be okay with it!
Hm? Was this your idea, Essex?
It was! Heeheee. I thought we should treat you to something special after flying all the way over here.
Took a lot of rehearsals and a lot of fine-tuning the direction.
In the end, we settled on this comparatively gentle one.
It's just a shame that we all had our hands full when we decided to do this.
We were gonna have a bigger shootout, with more people robbing the train. As it is now, it didn't hit nearly as hard as it could have.
It really is a shame. It would've been so cool if we could've had dozens of masked bandits riding along both sides of the train, shooting at each other.
That's a good idea!
What is?
What you just said! Dozens of bandits riding side-by-side, having a huge shootout!
That'd be like, THE clippable scene if it were in a movie! Right, Commander?
Let me guess – inspiration has struck you.
Exactamundo! Let me paint you a picture...
Wildnerness as far as the eye can see. The main character wanders through the lonesome lands, thirsty and hungry, and that's when they set foot in a remote frontier town...
Then they get caught up in the town's trouble! Exciting hijinx ensues! Something like that!
Okay... Even assuming everyone's fine with using the town as an open set, you don't have the equipment to film a movie. Also, who's going to write the script?
I mean, we kinda DO have the equipment. Any presenter worth their salt always brings their gear with them!
So you brought filming equipment with you on a vacation...
What about it? Everyone films their vacations! I want to capture those beautiful moments in time!
Anyway, as I was gonna say – Hai Tien can be the scriptwriter.
M-me? Um, I'm not particularly well-versed in this genre...
I COULD write it, but I'd need some of you to review it for changes and suggestions.
No problemo! That's easy to arrange.
So, we've got film equipment and a writer, and that's all we need. Let's make a film!
Not so fast. I want to see the schedule for the next few days first.
I don't want the film-making to collide with events that the others planned.
Don't worry about that. We only have two special events planned for you.
You'll have tons of free time to explore the town at your leisure, so the filming shouldn't collide with anything.
As for the events themselves, well... You'll find out more tomorrow!
If anyone's worried about their luggage, don't be. U-556 already brought it all to the town inn.
You're now free to explore the town at your whim. Go and enjoy yourselves!

The Settler Experience.say: Early in the morning, I receive a message from Yorktown to come meet her outside the town.
The event we have planned for you today is – the full settler experience.
Ugh. I'm getting tired just from hearing those words...
Don't even think about sneaking away. A Chevalier does not shy away from hard work.
I can broadly guess what it's about from the name alone, but what, specifically, are we going to do?
We're going to settle the wilds. Or, to put it another way, make this place feel more inhabitable.
Yup! It's about growing the settlement into a village, then from a village into a town.
That should give you an idea of what to expect.
Yes. That means finding food and water and creating a place to live for yourselves.
It takes luck, manpower, and a sense for community development! All of them are important!
In essence, you want us to build a new town from scratch, yes?
Magnificent!
I like the sound of that! I will make a town that serves as a beacon for Sardegna's glory!
Uhh... Sure? This is just to give you a taste of what it was like, though, so a small wooden hut will do just fine.
While there are plenty of materials to build with, you will need some carpentry skills.
Don't worry – we have prepared tools for you to work with.
Isn't there more to it than this? This feels a little easy for a first-settler experience.
Because there's more! You'll need to design and build your shelter as well as find food and water, and there's a time limit on all of them.
You need to secure all the essentials you need to survive, and you only have so much time to do so.
Only those who've obtained it all by the end can call themselves true pioneers!
Whoa, whoa, this is getting really hard really fast.
If it gets too hard, ya can always skip looking for food.
I've got plenty of canned stuff to go around!
It's the dreaded canned herring, isn't it?
Dred-dead... I don't know that word, but I wanna try it!
I'm just saying – if ya wanna lower the difficulty, come to me to get your can of food.
Being a settler wasn't easy, and your options are limited!
Fair enough... I'll keep it in mind as a last resort.
One thing is clear to me now. Failing to finish your hut within the time limit will also leave you with less time to find water and food.
Thus, your only option if you don't want to starve is to eat canned herring.
Sounds a lot like a punishment to me.
I'm only trying to motivate the rest of you. You should do like THEM and start designing your huts.
Clemenceau points toward two shipgirls, pen and paper in hand.
It's Dupleix and Strasbourg, frantically sketching up blueprints.
No way in hell! I'd sooner die than eat canned herring!
Well said! I fear no overtime – but that stuff? It scares me!
Seeing them work springs the rest of the girls into designing their own huts.
Heehee. THIS is how an event should be.
Good luck to you, Commander.
Well, personally, I would love to feed you some canned herring, but still.
Clemenceau smiles at me, then takes a sheet of paper and starts drawing.
(I'd better get to it...)
Sometime later...
Uh, Laffey, why have you only drawn a single triangle?
Because some planks glued together are good enough for me.
As long as I can get inside and sleep, that's all I need... Zzz...
Hmm... Perhaps I should convert the confessional into a prayer room.
Then again, a confessional leads to much more fun scenarios. Heehee.
This narrow plot of land isn't nearly big enough to demonstrate my creativity!
It really isn't! How do they expect me to be content with some shabby shack?
Sounds like you're all having fun, and we're still only in the design stage!
New Jersey looks around at the girls, then walks up to me.
What've you sketched up, honey? Can I see?
I give her my blueprint.
Hang on... Isn't this layout just like your office?
Don't tell me you're STILL in work mode. Are you not enjoying the vacay?
She shoots me a concerned look.
No, it's just that that's the only idea that came to mind as far as designs go.
Look at it this way – you all come through my office at some point, right? That makes it a starting point, in a sense.
So, without thinking about it, I just copied my office layout.
Heehee. That sounds almost like cheating.
Now that you mention it... Royal Maids, help my servant build that Wild West office!
As you wish, Your Majesty.
With a lot of extra help, my wooden frontier office is now complete.
Not bad. Not bad at all. However, we spent so long building it that we couldn't find any food or water...
You know what that means! Caaanned herring!
Wait! Let me try one last thing first!
Fu Shun picks up bits of wood scattered on the ground and makes a stack of them.
She constructs a very modest throne, then takes a seat on it.
Upon the altar of the justiciar shall I sit; toward the heavens and the seven stars shall I raise my sword!
Well, I don't have a sword, but still.
What are you doing?
What does it look like? I'm trying to borrow divine powers! Have you heard of the Empery expression, "borrow the east wind"? You can borrow food in the same way!
Let there be wind! Let there be rain! Let there be food!
...Hello?
Crickets. No wind blew, no rain fell, and no food appeared from thin air.
The tumbleweeds, however, heard her call and hit her directly.
C'mon, just accept the fact you'll be eating herring.
Herring goes around and gives everyone a can of herring.
We all gather on the floor of my frontier office and dig into our very modest meals.
With my breath held, I open the can and find not herring inside, but rather ordinary combat rations.
Huh? Did you replace the contents of these cans with regular rations?
Heh, I sure did, since nobody else appreciates the greatness of canned herring.
It was worth it to see the looks on your faces.
Hey! How come MINE has actual herring in it?
Oops, I forgot to mention some of them really are the real deal.
Ahahaha... Well, this isn't exactly what I expected...
But it did leave us with an unforgettable memory, wouldn't you say, Commander?
I give Yorktown a small nod, then turn my eyes on Herring, chasing Fu Shun around the office.
Unforgettable being the keyword.
And so, our trial of the settler experience concludes while the scent of canned herring hangs in the air.

Hunting for Gold.say: It's the next morning. I received a message from Hornet to come meet her at the plaza.
Hah! You're actually just in time, Commander! I thought you had a rep for arriving early.
I'm guessing you must've overslept because your bed was too comfy.
Equating being on time with oversleeping... What a terrible thing to say to someone.
Anyway, let's move on!
The event we have planned for you today iiis... gold scrounging! I've prepared some equipment to get you all started.
"Equipment"... You mean pans and shovels? I asked Essex about this just yesterday.
Those are the go-to, but that's not all we have. Indiana wanted to make it a little more fun.
See, if you want to look for valuables in the river, we've also got powerful magnets for you to use!
Magnets?!
Yeah, it's called magnet fishing. Instead of a hook and fishing line, you use a nylon rope and a powerful magnet to pull up metallic stuff from the riverbed.
Those who want to try magnet fishing, come to me to get your ropes and magnets.
And those who wanna do it the old-fashioned way, come get your shovels and pans here!
Ooh! Magnet fishing sounds more fun than panning!
So... The magnet hooks onto anything even remotely magnetic, right?
Yeah. You're bound to catch SOMETHING. I think it's perfect for you.
It is. At least I won't be going home empty-handed this way.
Pick whichever you feel suits you best!
Once everyone's geared up, Bell and I will take you to the river.
(Hmm... Which one...)
If you want to experience the authentic Wild West, you've gotta stick with tradition!
The temptation of a guaranteed catch is hard to resist. Let's do it the new way!
I take the equipment and follow the guides to a river not far from the resort town.
Y'know, it kind of dawned on me that scrounging for crumbs of metal isn't the most exciting thing...
It's just menial work repeated over and over. Should we spice it up by creating two teams and see who gets the best haul?
Competing over who gets the most doesn't make the work itself any more interesting.
In that case, why don't we make the act of looking for gold more interesting?
For instance, by letting everyone use whatever they have at hand to modify their tools. Within the spirit of gold-hunting, of course.
Ah. You mean allowing them to use their creativity to improve efficiency.
Exactly. That will make the work less repetitive, I believe.
It's a good idea. Hornet, tell the others about it.
On it!
Testing, testing... Alright, our first-ever Wild West Gold-Hunting Competition is well underway!
I'm Aoba, your on-the-scene commentator for this event!
Looks like the contestants are making some solid progress out there... Oh? What have we here?
It's da Vinci! She used her ingenuity and whatever was at hand to create a Fifty-Fifty Goldy Sifty Machine!
Weird... How come there's nothing but pebbles left?
Something must've gone wrong... Oh! That gives me another idea!
Uh-oh! Looks like da Vinci has run into trouble with her impromptu invention!
Let's go have a look at the other contestants!
Over to you, Alfredo!
Thanks, Aoba! Alfredo here, reporting to you live!
Let's turn our attention over to the group of magnet fishers!
Whoa, look at that speed! Baltimore found a spot and threw her magnet in so fast I could barely see it!
Look at her expression! That look screams, "there's GOT to be good stuff down there"!
Uh, I just threw it in a random spot...
Hey, over-the-top enthusiasm and exaggerations are the best part about live commentaries. Better get used to it!
Right...
Aoba and Alfredo run back and forth along the river, delivering commentary as they go.
(It really is a shame Guam's been stuck in her room doing editing work for the past few days. She'd bring a whole nother level of excitement to this place.)
I think idly to myself as I continue searching for valuables in the river.
Cut it out already! I'm only here to watch, not take part!
Really? You seemed so excited about it earlier.
And look, you've even got the equipment. I think you actually DO want to join in on the fund.
La la la, I can't hear you! I just happened to grab this stuff without any thought!
I can't afford to work up a sweat. Not with the Commander right over there.
Heehee... Worried about sweating, huh? I know just the thing that would help...
Oh yeah? What?
Take off all your clothes, then it won't be that hot!
Please stop being nudism's strongest soldier.
Oh, and also please stop taking off your cloak when I'm not around.
But the thought of working up a sweat with the Commander makes me feel all hot and botheeered...
That does not change the fact that it's public indecency.
A while later, Hornet announces that time is up. It's time to check our total haul for the day.
You know, I went into this knowing that anything could end up in a river...
But a torpedo? How?
Don't ask me. I've got no clue.
All I know is that this is a pretty good haul. Our efforts... panned out. Get it?
Let's see, if we ignore the torpedo... A wrench... A safe... Some pebbles... A tire?
Wait, did NOBODY find any gold?
Did San Diego put it in the wrong place when we were setting things up?
Did she what when you were what?
Don't worry about it! A lot of gold mining ends up yielding absolutely nothing of value!
Uh, yeah! Exactly!
Well, that's it for this event! Good work, y'all!

Wild West Night.say: Just as I'm about to return to my lodgings...
Sup. You busy, Commander?
I was going to retire for the night, but if you need help with something, I'm all ears.
Not really. Do you need help with something?
Kinda. I don't need your HELP so much as I want you to tag along.
The moon looks banging tonight, and I thought I'd round up some people and we'd all gaze at it together.
Indiana points to the moon.
It hangs in the prairie sky, waxing. It feels like you could reach out and pluck it.
You're right – the full moon is the best time to admire its beauty.
Hahah. Sounds like you're on board, so I'll send out some texts to some people!
Come along in the meanwhile. I'll show you the perfect spot for moon-gazing.
Indiana leads me to an empty stretch of land.
She quickly brushes up a spot on the ground then invites me to sit down with her.
Usually she looks all cool and collected, but under the silvery moonlight, she almost looks like a reserved wallflower.
Hey, Commander...
Yes?
Oh! There you two are!
I've brought all the invitees! And some snacks and drinks!
Before Indiana could finish her sentence, Essex interrupted her from afar.
Er, I'll tell you another time!
It wasn't anything important anyway. Ahem...
Her eyes wander, and her tone sounds vaguely dejected.
C'mon, you two! That's enough hush-hush talk between you!
Get over here and grab a snack that Essex got us!
Joining the others, we start a campfire and sit down around it.
Wooow, the moon is so pretty tonight! And look at all those stars!
Hrmh. The night sky shines brilliantly... Aha! This must be some sort of ploy by the Dark Requiem to get us to lower our guards!
Dark Requiem? What's that?
There, my companion! Do you see it? The brightest pair of stars in the sky – those are the eyes of the Specter Knight!
Are you really gonna do this bit when we're just trying to enjoy the view?
Heheheh... It's no bit. It's my identit– I mean, the truth as seen by my demon eye!
Hahah. You have an interesting way with words.
Wait, are you the kind of person who buys into this nonsense?
If it livens up the mood or if it makes you think, I can get down with it once in a while.
Don't you think so, too, Commander?
Oh no, the infection is spreading...
Okay, and what "deep lore" does the Milky Way have?
The Milky Way? That's a space ranch!
That's not even on the same wavelength as what she said a minute ago.
I mean, the Milky Way is milky, so a ranch makes sense! It's about the bigger picture!
Heehee. Isn't it nice, shooting the breeze with friends under the moon?
I'd even go so far as to say it's romantic, in a way.
The fire crackles while the girls munch on their snacks and talk about the vacation.
We've been on this subject long enough. Change of topic – what's the most memorable thing you've done on this vacation?
Oh, and nobody say, "help make a movie."
What's wrong with that?
It's what you'll all say. Let's hear something different.
True. What order do we go in? From U-556 on the left and to the right? Let's do that.
Hmm... Most memorable thing...
Maybe... ride a horse? I tried really hard to look cool outside of my natural element!
Did you like my acting during the train robbery scene? Wasn't it cool? Heehee!
The saddle was so firm and hard, though... Next time I ride a horse, I think I'll get a soft saddle.
Uh, do I have to be as specific as she just was?
You don't HAVE to be, but you DO need to give us some deets.
That's the annoying part...
I think the most memorable thing is this! This night under the moonlight, shared with you all!
Aww, listen to you, you big softie♪
Whatever! What's YOUR most memorable moment, huh?!
Mine? I think every moment of this vacation has been unforgettable.
As she says that, she leans her body against mine.
HEY! That's cheating! Call the ref!
I dunno, is this cheating? I'd say it's all pretty memorable.
I swear...
And so it goes as we talk and mess around well into the night.
The moon gazing party is about to wrap up, but then someone raises their voice.
Hey, how about one more memorable thing for the road, eh?
Indiana unholsters the revolver at her waist, spins it around her finger, then fires two shots into the air.
Whoooa! That looks even more fun than setting off fireworks!
What about those who don't have a revolver on hand?
Fire your cannons instead! Just mind your fire so the Commander doesn't get hurt!
Okay!
The girls deploy their riggings, load dummy rounds, and point their cannons skyward.
Well, some load Type 3 shells instead of dummy rounds. At any rate...
They all turn to me with excitement in their eyes, awaiting my order.
KABOOOM!
KABOOOOOOOM!
The night is lit up by cannon fire amidst a symphony of thunderous booms.
A little gunpowder smoke fills the air – but it's to celebrate the moment, not to make war.
Let's all do this again next year, Commander! We'll get together, watch the moon, and... No, let's just enjoy whatever comes our way!
Their delightful shouts echo into the Wild West sky.

Our Memories.say: There you have it! Quick, what'd you all think?
As soon as the premiere at the town's movie theater ends, Guam starts asking people for their thoughts on the movie.
The final cut came together a lot better than I expected!
It really did. For that last scene, was Laffey really sleeping on the set, though?
Mhm. I thought it'd get cut out. Guess they kept it in the final release...
Pretty good, huh? Editing skills are just one of my many, many talents!
We should totally establish a movie award show when we get back to the port!
After all, there'll be no motivation to make a movie if you don't dangle an award in front of–
GRUMBLE...
Guam? Did you skip lunch?
Shoot... Yeah. I've been doing nothing but crunching and editing in my room, so I totally forgot to eat.
How embarrassing, having my tummy grumble so loud in public... My reputation will never recover!
Ahahahah. I don't reckon the Commander cares much about a little grumble.
Nope. But since you're starving, Guam, you should come have lunch with us.

sequence: Sometime later...

Our Memories.say: Whew... That should do it. Let's call the others over.
Man, it's so sunny today... Are you sure you want to eat outdoors?
Why not? This weather is peak Wild West! Am I right or am I right, Hornet?
You're damn right! If you want the prime Wild West experience, you've gotta keep it authentic 'til the very end!
I agree with them both.
I think people will welcome this weather rather than complain about it.
As do I. Just look at this kitty – it's already enjoying the sunshine.
Richelieu looked at the Meowfficer in her lap.
Behind her, Shimakaze is running forward with a tray in her hands.
Oh no! The hamburger! I shouldn't have run so fast!
Careful!
Hold on a second. I'll help you.
Yeehaw! You girls go ahead and start eating without me! I've gotta bring this horse back to the stables!
Oh dear... A little slower, please, or my hat will fly off...
That looks fun. I wanna ride a horse, too!
Oops, hahaha! My bad!
Harbin's yelling and the clopping of her horse's hooves grow increasingly distant.
(Now this is a sight for sore eyes.)
I relish the warm feelings, then Guam suddenly gets up and passes by me as though she'd remembered something.
She walks up to Fargo – who's sitting next to me – and whispers to her before facing me with a smile.
Shh. Just watch. Don't say anything.
Guam puts her index finger to her lips and urges me to stay quiet.
Then, one of Fargo's drones takes to the air and starts circling above us.
What is it doing? Filming the feast?
Half-correct.
Only half?
You got the filming part right, but you haven't figured out WHY it's filming.
This is one of those precious moments, and precious moments deserve to be remembered.
And not just in our heads – you want to have something tangible!
Heehee. You're right about that.
Memories will fade with time, but films and pictures let us relive the moment at any time.
Finally, someone who sees things the way I do!
Oh, right! Commander, look up and smile!
Huh?
I want to capture the moment you smiled with the rest of us, duh!
Well, it might look a bit forced.
Hmm... Alright, then I'll start filming you in your day-to-day life instead.
If I were you, I'd get used to having a camera pointed at me♪
There'll be other moments like this that I wanna preserve, and there'll only be more and more as time goes on!

The Bartender's Gambit.say: When I enter the tavern at the arranged time, I find Pittsburgh already sitting at a table.
Heheheh. You're late, bounty hunter.
She crosses her legs and smiles.
(Hm? Isn't that a line from Act 3? She's already gotten into her role...)
Not quite. The one I'm waiting for isn't here yet.
I reply with my line and approach her.
Really? In that case...
How's about you and I pass the time together 'till then?
(She's improvising now?)
She takes me by the sleeve and leans in.
Her breath hits my neck. It feels like the room is getting hotter.
Say, bounty hunter... Cat got your tongue? Not sure what to say or do now?
She presses her prop gun's muzzle against my collar and then lowers it down to my chest.
(This is going a little far for improv... I mean, this isn't even part of the story, is it?)
Then let me tell you... how we can kill some time♡
Flushed cheeks, eyes burning with passion.
(Wait a second. Is she...)
Heehee♡ Your heart's just pounding, isn't it?
Is it because the window's open, and people can look in and see us? Did that excite you?
Pittsburgh...
Go on, I'm listening. What do you wanna do to me? I'm ready to satisfy♡
I grab the barrel of her prop gun before it can touch any... inappropriate places.
Commander, this is a rehearsal. Get into an acting mood already~
She huffs unhappily.
You're drunk, Pittsburgh.
I'm not drunk~
While we struggle over the gun, a wooden cask next to me falls over.
An orange liquid spills out of it.
Is that orange juice?
Yep~ It's too hot, so I drank a little between shoots...
It's still just a rehearsal... If you're thirsty, have a drink~
Oh... Did I drink it all already?
She tries to look inside the cask, but as soon as she leans forward, she falls toward me.
Such sweet, refreshing orange juice... It's a shame you didn't get some~
There might be a taste of it still on my lips... Wanna try?
Oh my, bounty hunter... I mean, Commander. You're awfully hot...
(I think she's the one who's heating up... Not that she'd listen when she's in this state.)
This won't be a very useful rehearsal at this rate. Let's get you somewhere you can rest...
Like where? There are rooms upstairs, but...
Just going back to my room and sleeping... That's boring. I'll pass on that.
Except...
Her crimson eyes look up at me. There's a gleam behind that glaze of intoxication.
If you do something fun with me... I might change my mind♡

High Noon Arrest.say: Phew! That part is finally over... I never thought filming a movie could be so exhausting.
Indiana casually sits on a wooden box and heaves a big sigh.
You did have to film that scene where you come down from above, after all. That takes stamina.
Yeah... You're right. And we did so many takes!
I'd better amp up my exercise routine. I can't be getting exhausted from something as simple as filming a movie!
The next shoot starts tonight. Want to go home and reset a bit?
About that... I think I'll wait for the prop runners to get here and help them clean up the wood debris.
Yeah. The wood from the broken ceiling.
If we don't keep the set clean, someone might trip and get hurt.
But I can't do it all myself, so I let them know in advance.
Let me help, too.
Ooh, thanks! Then let's wait for them together!
I'm surprised though, Indiana. I didn't think you the kind of person to worry about such little things.
Hm? Well, YOU pay a lot more attention to me than I thought you would.
Oh. Y'know, here I thought...
Actually, Commander, I feel the same...
Never mind!
Forget I said anything! Let's get back on topic!
You said I worry about little things, right?
That's a habit I picked up in combat. I only win because I don't miss the details.
So even when you use your fists to communicate, you still need to watch for openings.
Well, yeah. Having the power to knock someone out in one blow is important, but you need wisdom, too.
Otherwise, you'll lose someone who's an even match for you.
Indiana flashes a fearless smirk.
At the same time, sunlight shines through the hole in the ceiling.
It lands perfectly on her.
...Hm? Sun's out, huh?
After looking up once, she turns back to me.
The sun's shining right on you, Commander... I like this vibe.
You in the sun's light, the smell of drink... My mind full of pent-up feelings... Umm...
Hmm? Did you say something?
*cough!* *cough!* N-nothing! Just thinking of stuff that doesn't really matter!
I'll write about it and tell you later...
O-oh, the prop runners just texted me saying they'll be here soon.
Y'know what? Go home and rest, Commander. We'll do this.
We've got that nighttime scene later. It won't be easy!

Dairy in the Dreary Sun.say: I'd better clean this up...
I spot a certain someone cleaning up spilled milk.
Fargo? Anything I can help you with?
Commander...?
In this situation, I should raise my surprise index by 12.5%...
Commander?! Why are YOU here?!
Umm, well, you didn't come back when I thought you would. I got worried.
I apologize for the inconvenience caused by my overtime work.
Okay, understood.
Okay, understood. Thank you.
I'm recording your emotional index to sample "concern."
As for your previous question, whether there's anything you can help with...
I would like your help cleaning up this spilled milk.
Sure. I can do that.
I take a cloth, squat down next to her, and start wiping up milk.
At such a time, should I smile and display my "gratitude" emotion?
Normally, yeah.
Fargo smiles. It's a gentle, warm smile reminiscent of the sun itself.
However, her lovely smile fades in no time.
Data recorded. This is a rare emotional sample.
Thank you, Commander. Before I rest, I have another request...
What is it?
Yesterday's overwork has left my arms sore. I can't reach the milk that splashed onto me.
I need you to help wipe it off. Please?
I must raise my joy index by 1.2% and express my gratitude.
Big thankies, Commander!
I grab a towel this time and help wipe the milk off of her.
Mm... Right there is...
...C-Commander...
It's just the two of us. Fargo's blushing – a rare sight.
What is it?
My heart rate is rising, and I'm heating up in the places you're touching me...
Hmm. Based on my data so far, I believe this emotion may be... embarrassment?
Do you want me to stop?
No. I never said that...

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: Eeeek! S-stoooop!
(Is that Kersaint?!)
I rush over to the source of the scream and find a temporary fence. Inside of it is...
Kersaint!
C-Commander?! Aaah...!
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: R-run away while you still can! I-if you were... Hyah?!
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: If you were hurt... i-it would be horrendous... Pleeease, stop!
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: (There's no time to call for help!)
Kersaint, you need to control yourself!
Aah...! C-Commander!
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: Keep yourself balanced so you don't accidentally kick the cow!
O-okay! I'll try...
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: While she does her best to follow my instructions, the cow's rampage gradually comes to an end.
Using this opportunity, I lift up the hay bale in the corner and slowly approach the cow.
C-Commander! It's calming down a little... but...!
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: Please be careful...
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: I nod quietly in response, continue to approach, and put the hay down in front of the cow.
Then, I step back and reach my hand out...
After a several-minute-long confrontation, the cow finally starts eating.
*pant*... *pant*... Thank you, Commander, and the Holy Iris...
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: I walk over to its side and offer my hand to the exhausted Kersaint.
It's okay now.
Let go of the reins and slowly get off of it. Try not to startle it.
Okay...
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: She takes my hand, but she's still trembling. It doesn't seem like she'll be able to get off yet.
C-Commander, I'm still scared... What if I startle it and set it off again...?
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: Aah... I never knew dealing with animals could be so difficult... I-is this another trial given to me by the Iris?
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: Okay... *siiigh*...
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: After a big sigh, she starts to move.
But as soon as she turns...
I'm all... dizzy...
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: Kersaint!
I'm so sorry, Commander... But I really can't move anymore...
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: She slips off of the cow's back and falls into my arms.
The poor girl is shaking so much from the shock. When she reaches out, she clings tightly to my clothes.
I'm glad you're not hurt. Can you stand up?
Umm... Well...
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: No worries. I'll carry you back to your room.
C-Commander... Sorry for the trouble.
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.say: H-Hehe...
A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong.actorName: Kersaint [A Saint's Mercy Can Do No Wrong]

Fresh and Fortunate.say: Commander, this way~!
I turn around and see a familiar friend lying on a pool air mattress, waving at me.
I was just praying that I'd get to see you, and here you are...
Heehee, wishes come true quickly on lucky days.
Yes, it is. My fortune says that today is perfect for a date, too...
A date?
N-nothing... I'm sorry you had to hear that...
Huh? Are you saying... that you feel lucky to see me...?
Sure am. Especially since my plans changed and gave me an unexpected moment to rest.
That's lucky, and even more so that I got to see you here.
I see...
Come to think of it, you've been busy with the filming, no?
If you'd like, you could come relax in the pool with me.
I step into the pool on her suggestion. The chilly water quickly overwhelms the heat.
Then, I lie on the air mattress and scoot over next to her.
U-umm... Commander, could you hold this parfait for a moment?
I've been so focused on you that I ended up spilling it... Eep...
Holding the parfait in one hand, she tries to wipe the cream off of her chest with the other.
Sure. Clean yourself up, okay?
Thank you. Oh, and be careful you don't spill it on yourself.
She hands me the parfait and focuses her attention back on her chest.
It's a little embarrassing... Oh, not that I'd ask you to look away for me...
Ooh, it's a little sticky...
To make it easier to get off, she scoops water out of the pool and wets the affected area.
The dripping water wets her swimsuit. The thin, white fabric sticks to her skin, becoming semi-transparent.
Phew... That's better.
After she sits back up, I return her parfait.
This parfait is actually my lucky item for today.
Painlevé smiles bashfully and blushes.
Umm... I'd like to share my fortune with you...
You wanna share?
Yes. Basically... What I mean to say is, I'd like to feed you...
It's a little melted... but I just know you'll like it.
She gives me a spoonful of it. The sweetness of strawberry and cream blesses my tongue.
H-how do you like it?
That is tasty.
I'm glad to hear that!
I think I need another taste first.
C-Commander...
Thus, the two of us share the parfait and a relaxing afternoon together.

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: I visit the pool and find Friedrich der Große in the midst of relaxation.
What a time for us to meet, my child. Could this be fate?
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Or did you come specifically to find me?
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Lying down on a pool air mattress, she languidly stirs the water with her fingers.
Heehee. You do look rather tired. Come, rest.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Your honesty is much appreciated, my child.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Come... for your reward, please.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Eat cherries, have a drink, and relax.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Red liquid ripples in her glass. On closer inspection, her golden eyes look a tiny bit hazy.
(Is she tipsy, or...?)
(I don't know if I want to leave her alone in the pool right now...)
Umm, may I take you to your room?
Aww. Are you worried about me? Heehee...
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: It's okay. I'm not drunk at all.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Now, the fireworks have started. Come, my child, and watch by my side.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: I walk over to her as directed.
You're just standing... Are you anxious?
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Then have a drink. The alcohol by volume is low.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Friedrich passes me a goblet. I can still see the outlines of her lips on it.
I accept and take a sip from the side her lips touched.
There are simpler ways to sate your desires, my child.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: I spin the goblet around and drink from the untouched side.
Is someone feeling shy? Heehee.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Hmm. Yeah, you're not getting drunk off of this. I saw your face was red, so I assumed...
The sunlight is dazzling today, and the wind and sand batter me so... My skin may just be sensitive from the weather here.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: She sits up. The translucent black veil she's wearing gives a glimpse of her bare skin.
You're staring... Do you want another cherry?
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Before I can answer, she feeds me a cherry.
Sweet, isn't it?
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: I open my mouth and accept the refreshing sweetness.
I was just going to warn you not to catch a cold...
Heehee. Now that you're mentioning it, I do feel a little chilly.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Instead of fixing her "clothes," though, she pats the empty space next to her.
Lie down with me. Share your warmth, my child.
One Summer Night's Intimacy.actorName: Friedrich der Große [One Summer Night's Intimacy]

One Summer Night's Intimacy.say: Fireworks burst in the sky above, reflecting gloriously in the pool below.
